\newcommand{\AlertTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\AnnotationTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{#1}}
\newcommand{\AttributeTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.40,0.45,0.13}{#1}}
\newcommand{\BaseNTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\BuiltInTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{#1}}
\newcommand{\CharTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.13,0.47,0.30}{#1}}
\newcommand{\CommentTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{#1}}
\newcommand{\CommentVarTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{\textit{#1}}}
\newcommand{\ConstantTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.56,0.35,0.01}{#1}}
\newcommand{\ControlFlowTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{\textbf{#1}}}
\newcommand{\DataTypeTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\DecValTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\DocumentationTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{\textit{#1}}}
\newcommand{\ErrorTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\ExtensionTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{#1}}
\newcommand{\FloatTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\FunctionTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.28,0.35,0.67}{#1}}
\newcommand{\ImportTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.46,0.62}{#1}}
\newcommand{\InformationTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{#1}}
\newcommand{\KeywordTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{\textbf{#1}}}
\newcommand{\NormalTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{#1}}
\newcommand{\OperatorTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{#1}}
\newcommand{\OtherTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{#1}}
\newcommand{\PreprocessorTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.68,0.00,0.00}{#1}}
\newcommand{\RegionMarkerTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.00,0.23,0.31}{#1}}
\newcommand{\SpecialCharTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{#1}}
\newcommand{\SpecialStringTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.13,0.47,0.30}{#1}}
\newcommand{\StringTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.13,0.47,0.30}{#1}}
\newcommand{\VariableTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.07,0.07,0.07}{#1}}
\newcommand{\VerbatimStringTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.13,0.47,0.30}{#1}}
\newcommand{\WarningTok}[1]{\textcolor[rgb]{0.37,0.37,0.37}{\textit{#1}}}

\newsavebox\pandoc@box
\newcommand*\pandocbounded[1]{% scales image to fit in text height/width
  \sbox\pandoc@box{#1}%
  \Gscale@div\@tempa{\textheight}{\dimexpr\ht\pandoc@box+\dp\pandoc@box\relax}%
  \Gscale@div\@tempb{\linewidth}{\wd\pandoc@box}%
  \ifdim\@tempb\p@<\@tempa\p@\let\@tempa\@tempb\fi% select the smaller of both
  \ifdim\@tempa\p@<\p@\scalebox{\@tempa}{\usebox\pandoc@box}%
  \else\usebox{\pandoc@box}%
  \fi%
}

\subtitle{Quant Technology 1st Step}
\author{Eiichi Horigome}
\date{}

\setcounter{tocdepth}{2}
\tableofcontents

\bookmarksetup{startatroot}

\chapter{LagrangeFinance}\label{lagrangefinance}

Empirical Accounting, Finance and Financial Mathematics with tidyverse
in R.

\part{第I部 実証会計・ファイナンス}

\chapter{第1章
Rによるデータ分析の基礎}\label{ux7b2c1ux7ae0-rux306bux3088ux308bux30c7ux30fcux30bfux5206ux6790ux306eux57faux790e}

本章では、Rによるデータ分析に必要な基本操作を、Base
Rからtidyverseへ段階的に学ぶ。前半では、オブジェクト、ベクトル、行列、リスト、データフレーム、関数、条件判定、記述統計および確率分布を扱う。後半では、\texttt{dplyr}、\texttt{stringr}、\texttt{tidyr}、\texttt{purrr}、\texttt{ggplot2}を用いて、データの読込み、整形、集計、反復処理、可視化を一つの流れとして組み立てる。

Base
Rの項目構成は、Positが公開している\href{https://github.com/rstudio/cheatsheets/blob/main/base-r.pdf}{Base
R
Cheatsheet}を参考にしている。本章のコードでは、反復処理に明示的なループを使わず、ベクトル化または\texttt{purrr::map()}系関数を用いる。また、パイプ演算子はすべて\texttt{\textbar{}\textgreater{}}に統一する。

\section{1.1
使用するパッケージ}\label{ux4f7fux7528ux3059ux308bux30d1ux30c3ux30b1ux30fcux30b8}

本章ではtidyverseを使用する。tidyverseには、データ操作の\texttt{dplyr}、文字列処理の\texttt{stringr}、データ整形の\texttt{tidyr}、反復処理の\texttt{purrr}、可視化の\texttt{ggplot2}などが含まれる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{suppressPackageStartupMessages}\NormalTok{(\{}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(ggthemes)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(QuantLib)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(GaussQuant)}
\NormalTok{\})}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

パッケージが未導入の場合は、RStudioのConsoleで一度だけ次を実行する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{install.packages}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tidyverse"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{1.2 Rの基本操作}\label{rux306eux57faux672cux64cdux4f5c}

\subsection{オブジェクトと代入}\label{ux30aaux30d6ux30b8ux30a7ux30afux30c8ux3068ux4ee3ux5165}

Rでは、計算結果やデータをオブジェクトとして保存する。代入には\texttt{\textless{}-}を用いる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{risk\_free\_rate }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.01}
\NormalTok{future\_cash\_flow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{100}

\NormalTok{present\_value }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ future\_cash\_flow }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ risk\_free\_rate)}

\NormalTok{present\_value}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 99.0099
\end{verbatim}

オブジェクト名には、内容が分かる英単語を用いる。本書では複数の単語をアンダースコアで結ぶsnake\_caseを基本とする。

\subsection{四則演算と代表的な数学関数}\label{ux56dbux5247ux6f14ux7b97ux3068ux4ee3ux8868ux7684ux306aux6570ux5b66ux95a2ux6570}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{3}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 5
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\DecValTok{10} \SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{4}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 6
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\DecValTok{6} \SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{7}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 42
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\DecValTok{100} \SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{4}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 25
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{5}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 32
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{sqrt}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 4
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 1
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 3
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(pi, }\AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 3.142
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{signif}\NormalTok{(pi, }\AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 3.142
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{オブジェクトの型と構造}\label{ux30aaux30d6ux30b8ux30a7ux30afux30c8ux306eux578bux3068ux69cbux9020}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{numeric\_value }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{10.5}
\NormalTok{integer\_value }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{character\_value }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"Finance"}
\NormalTok{logical\_value }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}

\FunctionTok{class}\NormalTok{(numeric\_value)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "numeric"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{class}\NormalTok{(integer\_value)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "integer"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{class}\NormalTok{(character\_value)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "character"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{class}\NormalTok{(logical\_value)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "logical"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{typeof}\NormalTok{(numeric\_value)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "double"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{str}\NormalTok{(numeric\_value)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
 num 10.5
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{欠損値}\label{ux6b20ux640dux5024}

欠損値は\texttt{NA}で表す。欠損値の有無は\texttt{is.na()}で確認する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{returns\_with\_na }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(returns\_with\_na)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] FALSE  TRUE FALSE FALSE
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(returns\_with\_na))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 1
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(returns\_with\_na, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.01333333
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.3 ベクトル}\label{ux30d9ux30afux30c8ux30eb}

\subsection{ベクトルの作成}\label{ux30d9ux30afux30c8ux30ebux306eux4f5cux6210}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{interest\_rates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.015}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{year\_sequence }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}
\NormalTok{fine\_grid }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{from =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{to =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{by =} \FloatTok{0.25}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{repeated\_values }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{times =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{interest\_rates}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.010 0.015 0.020
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{year\_sequence}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 1 2 3 4 5
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fine\_grid}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.00 0.25 0.50 0.75 1.00
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{repeated\_values}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 100 100 100 100 100
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{ベクトルの要素}\label{ux30d9ux30afux30c8ux30ebux306eux8981ux7d20}

Rの添字は1から始まる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{interest\_rates[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.01
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{interest\_rates[}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.015 0.020
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{interest\_rates[}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.015 0.020
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{interest\_rates[interest\_rates }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \FloatTok{0.015}\NormalTok{]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.015 0.020
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{名前付きベクトル}\label{ux540dux524dux4ed8ux304dux30d9ux30afux30c8ux30eb}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{portfolio\_weights }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{stock =} \FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bond =} \FloatTok{0.3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{cash =} \FloatTok{0.1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{portfolio\_weights}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
stock  bond  cash 
  0.6   0.3   0.1 
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{portfolio\_weights[}\StringTok{"bond"}\NormalTok{]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
bond 
 0.3 
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(portfolio\_weights)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 1
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{ベクトル化}\label{ux30d9ux30afux30c8ux30ebux5316}

Rでは、多くの計算をベクトル全体に一度に適用できる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{discount\_rates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{by =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{cash\_flow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{100}

\NormalTok{present\_values }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cash\_flow }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ discount\_rates)}

\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(discount\_rates, present\_values)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 5 x 2
  discount_rates present_values
           <dbl>          <dbl>
1           0.01           99.0
2           0.02           98.0
3           0.03           97.1
4           0.04           96.2
5           0.05           95.2
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.4
行列、リスト、データフレーム}\label{ux884cux5217ux30eaux30b9ux30c8ux30c7ux30fcux30bfux30d5ux30ecux30fcux30e0}

\subsection{行列}\label{ux884cux5217}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_matrix }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.00}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{byrow =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(return\_matrix) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stock\_a"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"stock\_b"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(return\_matrix) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"month\_1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"month\_2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"month\_3"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{return\_matrix}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
        stock_a stock_b
month_1    0.01    0.02
month_2   -0.01    0.03
month_3    0.00    0.01
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_matrix[, }\StringTok{"stock\_a"}\NormalTok{]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
month_1 month_2 month_3 
   0.01   -0.01    0.00 
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{colMeans}\NormalTok{(return\_matrix)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
stock_a stock_b 
   0.00    0.02 
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{リスト}\label{ux30eaux30b9ux30c8}

リストには、型や長さの異なるオブジェクトをまとめて保存できる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{analysis\_result }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{model\_name =} \StringTok{"simple return model"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{coefficients =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{beta =} \FloatTok{1.05}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{observations =} \DecValTok{60}\NormalTok{L,}
  \AttributeTok{converged =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{analysis\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{model\_name}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "simple return model"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{analysis\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coefficients}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
alpha  beta 
0.001 1.050 
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{analysis\_result[[}\StringTok{"observations"}\NormalTok{]]}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 60
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{データフレーム}\label{ux30c7ux30fcux30bfux30d5ux30ecux30fcux30e0}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{firm\_data\_base }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{firm\_id =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{firm\_name =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Firm A"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Firm B"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Firm C"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{roe =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.08}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.12}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{firm\_data\_base}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
  firm_id firm_name  roe
1       1    Firm A 0.08
2       2    Firm B 0.12
3       3    Firm C 0.15
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{str}\NormalTok{(firm\_data\_base)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
'data.frame':   3 obs. of  3 variables:
 $ firm_id  : int  1 2 3
 $ firm_name: chr  "Firm A" "Firm B" "Firm C"
 $ roe      : num  0.08 0.12 0.15
\end{verbatim}

tidyverseでは、データフレームを拡張した\texttt{tibble}を用いる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{firm\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{firm\_id =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{firm\_name =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Firm A"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Firm B"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Firm C"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{roe =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.08}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.12}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{firm\_data}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 3
  firm_id firm_name   roe
    <int> <chr>     <dbl>
1       1 Firm A     0.08
2       2 Firm B     0.12
3       3 Firm C     0.15
\end{verbatim}

少量のデータを行単位で記述する場合は\texttt{tribble()}が便利である。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{project\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{project, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{initial\_cost, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{cash\_flow,}
  \StringTok{"A"}\NormalTok{,             }\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{,         }\DecValTok{120}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"B"}\NormalTok{,             }\DecValTok{150}\NormalTok{,         }\DecValTok{175}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{,             }\DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{,         }\DecValTok{215}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{project\_data}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 3
  project initial_cost cash_flow
  <chr>          <dbl>     <dbl>
1 A                100       120
2 B                150       175
3 C                200       215
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.5
条件判定と独自関数}\label{ux6761ux4ef6ux5224ux5b9aux3068ux72ecux81eaux95a2ux6570}

\subsection{条件判定}\label{ux6761ux4ef6ux5224ux5b9a}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{npv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{5.2}

\NormalTok{investment\_decision }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (npv }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \StringTok{"投資を実行する"}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \StringTok{"投資を見送る"}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{investment\_decision}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "投資を実行する"
\end{verbatim}

ベクトルに対する複数の条件分岐には\texttt{case\_when()}を用いる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{credit\_scores }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{score =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{85}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{72}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{58}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{91}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{credit\_scores }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{rating =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      score }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{80} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"A"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      score }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{65} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"B"}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"C"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 4 x 2
  score rating
  <dbl> <chr> 
1    85 A     
2    72 B     
3    58 C     
4    91 A     
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{独自関数}\label{ux72ecux81eaux95a2ux6570}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{calculate\_present\_value }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(cash\_flow, discount\_rate, }\AttributeTok{years =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  cash\_flow }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ discount\_rate)}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\NormalTok{years}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{calculate\_present\_value}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cash\_flow =} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{discount\_rate =} \FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{years =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 94.23223
\end{verbatim}

関数はベクトルをそのまま受け取れるように設計すると再利用しやすい。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{calculate\_present\_value}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{cash\_flow =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_rate =} \FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{years =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 98.03922 96.11688 94.23223
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.6 記述統計}\label{ux8a18ux8ff0ux7d71ux8a08}

\subsection{代表値と散らばり}\label{ux4ee3ux8868ux5024ux3068ux6563ux3089ux3070ux308a}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{sample\_returns }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.00}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.04}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.01333333
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{median}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.015
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] -0.02
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.04
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{range}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] -0.02  0.04
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{var}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.0004666667
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.02160247
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(sample\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
     0%     25%     50%     75%    100% 
-0.0200  0.0025  0.0150  0.0275  0.0400 
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{共分散と相関}\label{ux5171ux5206ux6563ux3068ux76f8ux95a2}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{stock\_a }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.04}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{stock\_b }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.00}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{cov}\NormalTok{(stock\_a, stock\_b)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.00035
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{cor}\NormalTok{(stock\_a, stock\_b)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.9615239
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{順位}\label{ux9806ux4f4d}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{firm\_returns }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.08}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.12}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{rank}\NormalTok{(firm\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 3 4 1 2
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{rank}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{firm\_returns)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 2 1 4 3
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{order}\NormalTok{(firm\_returns, }\AttributeTok{decreasing =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 2 1 4 3
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.7 確率分布}\label{ux78baux7387ux5206ux5e03}

Rの確率分布関数には共通した命名規則がある。

{\def\LTcaptype{none} % do not increment counter
\begin{longtable}[]{@{}ll@{}}
\toprule\noalign{}
接頭辞 & 内容 \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endhead
\bottomrule\noalign{}
\endlastfoot
\texttt{r} & 乱数を生成する \\
\texttt{d} & 確率密度または確率質量を求める \\
\texttt{p} & 累積確率を求める \\
\texttt{q} & 累積確率に対応する分位点を求める \\
\end{longtable}
}

\subsection{一様分布}\label{ux4e00ux69d8ux5206ux5e03}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1234}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{uniform\_random }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{runif}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{min =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{max =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{uniform\_random}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
 [1] 0.113703411 0.622299405 0.609274733 0.623379442 0.860915384 0.640310605
 [7] 0.009495756 0.232550506 0.666083758 0.514251141
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{dunif}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{min =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{max =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 1
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{punif}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{min =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{max =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.5
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{qunif}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{min =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{max =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.95
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{正規分布}\label{ux6b63ux898fux5206ux5e03}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1234}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{normal\_random }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{normal\_random}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
 [1] -1.2070657  0.2774292  1.0844412 -2.3456977  0.4291247  0.5060559
 [7] -0.5747400 -0.5466319 -0.5644520 -0.8900378
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.3989423
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{pnorm}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{1.96}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.9750021
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{qnorm}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.975}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 1.959964
\end{verbatim}

\texttt{dnorm()}は正規分布の密度、\texttt{pnorm()}は指定した値以下となる確率、\texttt{qnorm()}は指定した累積確率に対応する分位点を返す。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{probability\_below }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pnorm}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{value\_at\_risk\_95 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{qnorm}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{probability\_below}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.1586553
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{value\_at\_risk\_95}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] -0.03934561
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{二項分布}\label{ux4e8cux9805ux5206ux5e03}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1234}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{binomial\_random }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rbinom}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{prob =} \FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{binomial\_random}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
 [1] 15 11 11 11 10 11 17 14 11 12
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{dbinom}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{prob =} \FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.1797058
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{pbinom}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{prob =} \FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.5841071
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{qbinom}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{prob =} \FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 16
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{ポアソン分布}\label{ux30ddux30a2ux30bdux30f3ux5206ux5e03}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1234}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{poisson\_random }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rpois}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{lambda =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{poisson\_random}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
 [1] 1 3 3 3 5 3 0 2 4 3
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{dpois}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{lambda =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.2240418
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{ppois}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{lambda =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 0.4231901
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{qpois}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{lambda =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] 6
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{分布関数の比較}\label{ux5206ux5e03ux95a2ux6570ux306eux6bd4ux8f03}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{distribution\_functions }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{distribution, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{random\_function, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{density\_function, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{cumulative\_function, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{quantile\_function,}
  \StringTok{"一様分布"}\NormalTok{,    }\StringTok{"runif()"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"dunif()"}\NormalTok{,         }\StringTok{"punif()"}\NormalTok{,            }\StringTok{"qunif()"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"正規分布"}\NormalTok{,    }\StringTok{"rnorm()"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"dnorm()"}\NormalTok{,         }\StringTok{"pnorm()"}\NormalTok{,            }\StringTok{"qnorm()"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"二項分布"}\NormalTok{,    }\StringTok{"rbinom()"}\NormalTok{,       }\StringTok{"dbinom()"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"pbinom()"}\NormalTok{,           }\StringTok{"qbinom()"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"ポアソン分布"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"rpois()"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"dpois()"}\NormalTok{,         }\StringTok{"ppois()"}\NormalTok{,            }\StringTok{"qpois()"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{distribution\_functions}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 4 x 5
  distribution random_function density_function cumulative_function
  <chr>        <chr>           <chr>            <chr>              
1 一様分布     runif()         dunif()          punif()            
2 正規分布     rnorm()         dnorm()          pnorm()            
3 二項分布     rbinom()        dbinom()         pbinom()           
4 ポアソン分布 rpois()         dpois()          ppois()            
# i 1 more variable: quantile_function <chr>
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.8
プロジェクト内のデータを読み込む}\label{ux30d7ux30edux30b8ux30a7ux30afux30c8ux5185ux306eux30c7ux30fcux30bfux3092ux8aadux307fux8fbcux3080}

本書で使用するデータは、プロジェクトルートの\texttt{simulation\_data}ディレクトリに置かれている。絶対パスをコードへ直接書くと、プロジェクトを別の場所へ移したときに動かなくなる。そのため、現在の作業ディレクトリと\texttt{\_quarto.yml}を利用してプロジェクトルートを確認する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{project\_candidates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{Sys.getenv}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"QUARTO\_PROJECT\_DIR"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{getwd}\NormalTok{(),}
  \FunctionTok{dirname}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{getwd}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{project\_candidates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ project\_candidates[}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(project\_candidates)]}

\NormalTok{project\_matches }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ project\_candidates[}
  \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(project\_candidates, }\StringTok{"\_quarto.yml"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{]}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(project\_matches) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"LagrangeFinanceのプロジェクトルートを確認できません。"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{project\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalizePath}\NormalTok{(project\_matches[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{winslash =} \StringTok{"/"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mustWork =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{data\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(project\_dir, }\StringTok{"simulation\_data"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{dir.exists}\NormalTok{(data\_dir)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"simulation\_dataディレクトリが見つかりません: "}\NormalTok{, data\_dir)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{project\_dir}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "C:/AnalyticFin/Projects/LagrangeFinance"
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data\_dir}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "C:/AnalyticFin/Projects/LagrangeFinance/simulation_data"
\end{verbatim}

\texttt{simulation\_data}以下のCSVファイルを再帰的に確認する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{csv\_paths }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list.files}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{path =}\NormalTok{ data\_dir,}
  \AttributeTok{pattern =} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.csv$"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{full.names =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{recursive =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{normalized\_data\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalizePath}\NormalTok{(data\_dir, }\AttributeTok{winslash =} \StringTok{"/"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mustWork =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{normalized\_csv\_paths }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalizePath}\NormalTok{(csv\_paths, }\AttributeTok{winslash =} \StringTok{"/"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mustWork =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{csv\_catalog }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{file\_name =} \FunctionTok{basename}\NormalTok{(csv\_paths),}
  \AttributeTok{relative\_path =} \FunctionTok{substring}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    normalized\_csv\_paths,}
    \AttributeTok{first =} \FunctionTok{nchar}\NormalTok{(normalized\_data\_dir) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(relative\_path)}

\NormalTok{csv\_catalog}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 27 x 2
   file_name                    relative_path               
   <chr>                        <chr>                       
 1 ch03_daily_stock_return.csv  ch03_daily_stock_return.csv 
 2 ch03_output.csv              ch03_output.csv             
 3 ch04_financial_data.csv      ch04_financial_data.csv     
 4 ch04_output.csv              ch04_output.csv             
 5 ch05_accounting_standard.csv ch05_accounting_standard.csv
 6 ch05_earnings_management.csv ch05_earnings_management.csv
 7 ch05_messy_stock_return.csv  ch05_messy_stock_return.csv 
 8 ch05_output1.csv             ch05_output1.csv            
 9 ch05_output2.csv             ch05_output2.csv            
10 ch05_stock_data.csv          ch05_stock_data.csv         
# i 17 more rows
\end{verbatim}

第1章では、従来から使用している\texttt{ch03\_daily\_stock\_return.csv}を読み込む。ファイルが\texttt{simulation\_data}内のサブディレクトリに置かれていても検索できる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{daily\_return\_candidates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ csv\_paths[}
  \FunctionTok{basename}\NormalTok{(csv\_paths) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ch03\_daily\_stock\_return.csv"}
\NormalTok{]}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(daily\_return\_candidates) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ch03\_daily\_stock\_return.csvがsimulation\_data以下に見つかりません。"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{daily\_return\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ daily\_return\_candidates[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}

\NormalTok{daily\_stock\_return }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ readr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  daily\_return\_path,}
  \AttributeTok{show\_col\_types =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{required\_columns }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"date"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"firm1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"firm2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{missing\_columns }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(required\_columns, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(daily\_stock\_return))}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_columns) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"必要な列が不足しています: "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(missing\_columns, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{daily\_stock\_return }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ daily\_stock\_return }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{date =} \FunctionTok{as.Date}\NormalTok{(date))}

\NormalTok{daily\_stock\_return}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 21 x 3
   date          firm1    firm2
   <date>        <dbl>    <dbl>
 1 2020-04-01 -0.0395   0.0770 
 2 2020-04-02  0.00598 -0.00725
 3 2020-04-03  0.0558  -0.0173 
 4 2020-04-06  0.0419   0.00217
 5 2020-04-07 -0.0202   0.0755 
 6 2020-04-08 -0.00229 -0.0962 
 7 2020-04-09  0.0817   0.0788 
 8 2020-04-10  0.0346   0.0215 
 9 2020-04-13  0.0326   0.135  
10 2020-04-14 -0.0377   0.0380 
# i 11 more rows
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.9
dplyrによるデータ操作}\label{dplyrux306bux3088ux308bux30c7ux30fcux30bfux64cdux4f5c}

\subsection{列を選ぶ}\label{ux5217ux3092ux9078ux3076}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{daily\_stock\_return }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(date, firm1)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{daily\_stock\_return }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(firm1 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 12 x 3
   date         firm1    firm2
   <date>       <dbl>    <dbl>

複数の条件を同時に指定できる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{daily\_stock\_return }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(firm1 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, firm2 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 7 x 3
  date         firm1   firm2
  <date>       <dbl>   <dbl>
1 2020-04-06 0.0419  0.00217
2 2020-04-09 0.0817  0.0788 
3 2020-04-10 0.0346  0.0215 
4 2020-04-13 0.0326  0.135  
5 2020-04-15 0.00988 0.0114 
6 2020-04-17 0.171   0.0395 
7 2020-04-20 0.0463  0.0373 
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{列を追加する}\label{ux5217ux3092ux8ffdux52a0ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ daily\_stock\_return }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{spread =}\NormalTok{ firm1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ firm2,}
    \AttributeTok{firm1\_gross\_return =} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ firm1,}
    \AttributeTok{firm2\_gross\_return =} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ firm2,}
    \AttributeTok{market\_direction =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      firm1 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ firm2 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"both\_positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      firm1 }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ firm2 }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"both\_negative"}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"mixed"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{return\_data}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{要約する}\label{ux8981ux7d04ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{observations =} \FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{mean\_firm1 =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(firm1),}
    \AttributeTok{sd\_firm1 =} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(firm1),}
    \AttributeTok{mean\_firm2 =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(firm2),}
    \AttributeTok{sd\_firm2 =} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(firm2),}
    \AttributeTok{correlation =} \FunctionTok{cor}\NormalTok{(firm1, firm2)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 1 x 6
  observations mean_firm1 sd_firm1 mean_firm2 sd_firm2 correlation
         <int>      <dbl>    <dbl>      <dbl>    <dbl>       <dbl>
1           21     0.0142   0.0538    0.00803   0.0544       0.233
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{グループごとに集計する}\label{ux30b0ux30ebux30fcux30d7ux3054ux3068ux306bux96c6ux8a08ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(market\_direction) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{observations =} \FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{mean\_firm1 =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(firm1),}
    \AttributeTok{mean\_firm2 =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(firm2),}
    \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{desc}\NormalTok{(observations))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 4
  market_direction observations mean_firm1 mean_firm2
  <chr>                   <int>      <dbl>      <dbl>
1 mixed                       8    0.00816    0.00989
2 both_positive               7    0.0598     0.0466 
3 both_negative               6   -0.0310    -0.0394 
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{件数を数える}\label{ux4ef6ux6570ux3092ux6570ux3048ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{count}\NormalTok{(market\_direction, }\AttributeTok{sort =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 2
  market_direction     n
  <chr>            <int>
1 mixed                8
2 both_positive        7
3 both_negative        6
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{データを結合する}\label{ux30c7ux30fcux30bfux3092ux7d50ux5408ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{firm\_master }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{firm,  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{firm\_name, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{industry,}
  \StringTok{"firm1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Firm A"}\NormalTok{,  }\StringTok{"Machinery"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"firm2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Firm B"}\NormalTok{,  }\StringTok{"Chemicals"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{return\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ return\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{firm1 =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(firm1),}
    \AttributeTok{firm2 =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(firm2)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{cols =} \FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"firm"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"mean\_return"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{return\_summary }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(firm\_master, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"firm"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 2 x 4
  firm  mean_return firm_name industry 
  <chr>       <dbl> <chr>     <chr>    
1 firm1     0.0142  Firm A    Machinery
2 firm2     0.00803 Firm B    Chemicals
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.10
stringrによる文字列処理}\label{stringrux306bux3088ux308bux6587ux5b57ux5217ux51e6ux7406}

文字列処理では、関数名が\texttt{str\_}で始まる\texttt{stringr}を使用する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{company\_names }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{raw\_name =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"  Alpha Holdings Co., Ltd. "}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Beta Financial Group"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Gamma Industries"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{company\_names }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ company\_names }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{clean\_name =} \FunctionTok{str\_squish}\NormalTok{(raw\_name),}
    \AttributeTok{lower\_name =} \FunctionTok{str\_to\_lower}\NormalTok{(clean\_name),}
    \AttributeTok{name\_length =} \FunctionTok{str\_length}\NormalTok{(clean\_name),}
    \AttributeTok{contains\_group =} \FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(clean\_name, }\FunctionTok{regex}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"group"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ignore\_case =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{first\_word =} \FunctionTok{str\_extract}\NormalTok{(clean\_name, }\StringTok{"\^{}[A{-}Za{-}z]+"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{company\_names}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 6
  raw_name           clean_name lower_name name_length contains_group first_word
  <chr>              <chr>      <chr>            <int> <lgl>          <chr>     
1 "  Alpha Holdings~ Alpha Hol~ alpha hol~          24 FALSE          Alpha     
2 "Beta Financial G~ Beta Fina~ beta fina~          20 TRUE           Beta      
3 "Gamma Industries" Gamma Ind~ gamma ind~          16 FALSE          Gamma     
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{置換と結合}\label{ux7f6eux63dbux3068ux7d50ux5408}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{company\_names }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{short\_name =} \FunctionTok{str\_remove}\NormalTok{(clean\_name, }\FunctionTok{regex}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" co}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{., ltd}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.$"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ignore\_case =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{display\_name =} \FunctionTok{str\_c}\NormalTok{(first\_word, }\StringTok{" / "}\NormalTok{, name\_length, }\StringTok{" characters"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(clean\_name, short\_name, display\_name)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 3
  clean_name               short_name           display_name         
  <chr>                    <chr>                <chr>                
1 Alpha Holdings Co., Ltd. Alpha Holdings       Alpha / 24 characters
2 Beta Financial Group     Beta Financial Group Beta / 20 characters 
3 Gamma Industries         Gamma Industries     Gamma / 16 characters
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.11
tidyrによるデータ整形}\label{tidyrux306bux3088ux308bux30c7ux30fcux30bfux6574ux5f62}

\subsection{wide形式からlong形式へ変換する}\label{wideux5f62ux5f0fux304bux3089longux5f62ux5f0fux3078ux5909ux63dbux3059ux308b}

元のデータでは、\texttt{firm1}と\texttt{firm2}が別々の列に格納されている。\texttt{pivot\_longer()}を使うと、企業名とリターンをそれぞれ一つの列へまとめられる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_long }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ daily\_stock\_return }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{cols =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(firm1, firm2),}
    \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"firm"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"return"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{return\_long}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 42 x 3
   date       firm    return
   <date>     <chr>    <dbl>
 1 2020-04-01 firm1 -0.0395 
 2 2020-04-01 firm2  0.0770 
 3 2020-04-02 firm1  0.00598
 4 2020-04-02 firm2 -0.00725
 5 2020-04-03 firm1  0.0558 
 6 2020-04-03 firm2 -0.0173 
 7 2020-04-06 firm1  0.0419 
 8 2020-04-06 firm2  0.00217
 9 2020-04-07 firm1 -0.0202 
10 2020-04-07 firm2  0.0755 
# i 32 more rows
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{long形式からwide形式へ戻す}\label{longux5f62ux5f0fux304bux3089wideux5f62ux5f0fux3078ux623bux3059}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_long }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ firm,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ return}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 21 x 3
   date          firm1    firm2
   <date>        <dbl>    <dbl>
 1 2020-04-01 -0.0395   0.0770 
 2 2020-04-02  0.00598 -0.00725
 3 2020-04-03  0.0558  -0.0173 
 4 2020-04-06  0.0419   0.00217
 5 2020-04-07 -0.0202   0.0755 
 6 2020-04-08 -0.00229 -0.0962 
 7 2020-04-09  0.0817   0.0788 
 8 2020-04-10  0.0346   0.0215 
 9 2020-04-13  0.0326   0.135  
10 2020-04-14 -0.0377   0.0380 
# i 11 more rows
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{文字列を複数列へ分ける}\label{ux6587ux5b57ux5217ux3092ux8907ux6570ux5217ux3078ux5206ux3051ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{security\_codes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{security\_id =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"JP{-}1001"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"JP{-}1002"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"US{-}2001"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{security\_codes }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{separate\_wider\_delim}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    security\_id,}
    \AttributeTok{delim =} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{names =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"country"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"code"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 2
  country code 
  <chr>   <chr>
1 JP      1001 
2 JP      1002 
3 US      2001 
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{欠損値を処理する}\label{ux6b20ux640dux5024ux3092ux51e6ux7406ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{missing\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{firm =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"A"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"B"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{return =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{missing\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{return =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 2
  firm  return
  <chr>  <dbl>
1 A       0.02
2 B       0   
3 C      -0.01
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{missing\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{drop\_na}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 2 x 2
  firm  return
  <chr>  <dbl>
1 A       0.02
2 C      -0.01
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.12
purrrによる反復処理}\label{purrrux306bux3088ux308bux53cdux5fa9ux51e6ux7406}

\subsection{map()と型を指定するmap系関数}\label{mapux3068ux578bux3092ux6307ux5b9aux3059ux308bmapux7cfbux95a2ux6570}

\texttt{map()}は結果をリストとして返す。数値ベクトルが必要な場合は\texttt{map\_dbl()}を用いる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{discount\_rates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.04}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discount\_rates }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(\textbackslash{}(rate) }\FunctionTok{calculate\_present\_value}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, rate))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[[1]]
[1] 99.0099

[[2]]
[1] 98.03922

[[3]]
[1] 97.08738

[[4]]
[1] 96.15385
\end{verbatim}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{present\_value\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_rate =}\NormalTok{ discount\_rates,}
  \AttributeTok{present\_value =}\NormalTok{ discount\_rates }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{map\_dbl}\NormalTok{(\textbackslash{}(rate) }\FunctionTok{calculate\_present\_value}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, rate))}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{present\_value\_table}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 4 x 2
  discount_rate present_value
          <dbl>         <dbl>
1          0.01          99.0
2          0.02          98.0
3          0.03          97.1
4          0.04          96.2
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{map2()で二つのベクトルを同時に処理する}\label{map2ux3067ux4e8cux3064ux306eux30d9ux30afux30c8ux30ebux3092ux540cux6642ux306bux51e6ux7406ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cash\_flows }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{120}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{150}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{years }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{map2\_dbl}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cash\_flows,}
\NormalTok{  years,}
\NormalTok{  \textbackslash{}(cash\_flow, year) }\FunctionTok{calculate\_present\_value}\NormalTok{(cash\_flow, }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, year)}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1]  98.03922 115.34025 141.34835
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{pmap()で複数の列を処理する}\label{pmapux3067ux8907ux6570ux306eux5217ux3092ux51e6ux7406ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cash\_flow\_scenarios }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{cash\_flow, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{discount\_rate, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{years,}
         \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{,           }\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{,      }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
         \DecValTok{120}\NormalTok{,           }\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{,      }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
         \DecValTok{150}\NormalTok{,           }\FloatTok{0.03}\NormalTok{,      }\DecValTok{3}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cash\_flow\_scenarios }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{present\_value =} \FunctionTok{pmap\_dbl}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(cash\_flow, discount\_rate, years),}
\NormalTok{      \textbackslash{}(cash\_flow, discount\_rate, years) \{}
        \FunctionTok{calculate\_present\_value}\NormalTok{(cash\_flow, discount\_rate, years)}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3 x 4
  cash_flow discount_rate years present_value
      <dbl>         <dbl> <dbl>         <dbl>
1       100          0.01     1          99.0
2       120          0.02     2         115. 
3       150          0.03     3         137. 
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{複数列へ同じ集計を適用する}\label{ux8907ux6570ux5217ux3078ux540cux3058ux96c6ux8a08ux3092ux9069ux7528ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_columns }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"firm1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"firm2"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{return\_columns }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    \textbackslash{}(column\_name) \{}
\NormalTok{      values }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ daily\_stock\_return[[column\_name]]}

      \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{firm =}\NormalTok{ column\_name,}
        \AttributeTok{observations =} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(values),}
        \AttributeTok{mean =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(values),}
        \AttributeTok{standard\_deviation =} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(values),}
        \AttributeTok{minimum =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(values),}
        \AttributeTok{maximum =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(values)}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 2 x 6
  firm  observations    mean standard_deviation minimum maximum
  <chr>        <int>   <dbl>              <dbl>   <dbl>   <dbl>
1 firm1           21 0.0142              0.0538 -0.0721   0.171
2 firm2           21 0.00803             0.0544 -0.0962   0.135
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{複数の確率分布を同じ形式で生成する}\label{ux8907ux6570ux306eux78baux7387ux5206ux5e03ux3092ux540cux3058ux5f62ux5f0fux3067ux751fux6210ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1234}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{distribution\_specs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{distribution, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{generator,}
  \StringTok{"uniform"}\NormalTok{,      \textbackslash{}(n) }\FunctionTok{runif}\NormalTok{(n, }\AttributeTok{min =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{max =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"normal"}\NormalTok{,       \textbackslash{}(n) }\FunctionTok{rnorm}\NormalTok{(n, }\AttributeTok{mean =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sd =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"poisson"}\NormalTok{,      \textbackslash{}(n) }\FunctionTok{rpois}\NormalTok{(n, }\AttributeTok{lambda =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{simulated\_distributions }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ distribution\_specs }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{map}\NormalTok{(generator, \textbackslash{}(generator) }\FunctionTok{generator}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{generator) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{unnest\_longer}\NormalTok{(values)}

\NormalTok{simulated\_distributions}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
# A tibble: 3,000 x 2
   distribution  values
   <chr>          <dbl>
 1 uniform      -0.773 
 2 uniform       0.245 
 3 uniform       0.219 
 4 uniform       0.247 
 5 uniform       0.722 
 6 uniform       0.281 
 7 uniform      -0.981 
 8 uniform      -0.535 
 9 uniform       0.332 
10 uniform       0.0285
# i 2,990 more rows
\end{verbatim}

\subsection{walk()で副作用だけを実行する}\label{walkux3067ux526fux4f5cux7528ux3060ux3051ux3092ux5b9fux884cux3059ux308b}

\texttt{walk()}は、返り値を保存するのではなく、表示などの副作用だけを順番に実行するときに使う。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"firm1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"firm2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{walk}\NormalTok{(\textbackslash{}(firm) }\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str\_c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"集計対象: "}\NormalTok{, firm)))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{verbatim}
[1] "集計対象: firm1"
[1] "集計対象: firm2"
\end{verbatim}

\section{1.13
ggplot2による可視化}\label{ggplot2ux306bux3088ux308bux53efux8996ux5316}

\texttt{ggplot2}では、データを\texttt{ggplot()}へ渡し、\texttt{aes()}で変数と視覚要素の対応を指定し、\texttt{geom\_*()}で図形を追加する。

\subsection{折れ線グラフ}\label{ux6298ux308cux7ddaux30b0ux30e9ux30d5}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_long }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ date, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ return, }\AttributeTok{linetype =}\NormalTok{ firm)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Date"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Daily Return"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"Firm"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part1_empirical/ch01_r_basics_tidyverse_files/figure-pdf/ggplot-line-1.pdf}}

\subsection{ヒストグラム}\label{ux30d2ux30b9ux30c8ux30b0ux30e9ux30e0}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_long }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ return)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{boundary =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vars}\NormalTok{(firm), }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Daily Return"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Count"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part1_empirical/ch01_r_basics_tidyverse_files/figure-pdf/ggplot-histogram-1.pdf}}

\subsection{密度関数}\label{ux5bc6ux5ea6ux95a2ux6570}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{return\_long }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ return, }\AttributeTok{linetype =}\NormalTok{ firm)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_density}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Daily Return"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"Firm"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part1_empirical/ch01_r_basics_tidyverse_files/figure-pdf/ggplot-density-1.pdf}}

\subsection{正規分布の密度と累積分布}\label{ux6b63ux898fux5206ux5e03ux306eux5bc6ux5ea6ux3068ux7d2fux7a4dux5206ux5e03}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{normal\_curve }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{x =} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{length.out =} \DecValTok{401}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{density =} \FunctionTok{dnorm}\NormalTok{(x),}
  \AttributeTok{cumulative\_probability =} \FunctionTok{pnorm}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{normal\_curve }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{cols =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(density, cumulative\_probability),}
    \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"function\_type"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"value"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ value)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vars}\NormalTok{(function\_type), }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free\_y"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"x"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part1_empirical/ch01_r_basics_tidyverse_files/figure-pdf/ggplot-normal-functions-1.pdf}}

\subsection{シミュレーション結果を比較する}\label{ux30b7ux30dfux30e5ux30ecux30fcux30b7ux30e7ux30f3ux7d50ux679cux3092ux6bd4ux8f03ux3059ux308b}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{simulated\_distributions }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ values)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{30}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vars}\NormalTok{(distribution), }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Simulated Value"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Count"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
