\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}               \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 market\_spread      0.013 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 recovery\_rate      0.4   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 loss\_given\_default 0.6   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 hazard\_rate\_approx 0.0217}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  flat\_probability\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Flat{-}hazard probability curve"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{30}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 21 x 3}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}     time survival\_probability cumulative\_default\_probability}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}                \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}                          \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1  0                   1                            0      }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2  0.25                0.995                        0.00540}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3  0.5                 0.989                        0.0108 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4  0.75                0.984                        0.0161 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5  1                   0.979                        0.0214 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6  1.25                0.973                        0.0267 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7  1.5                 0.968                        0.0320 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8  1.75                0.963                        0.0372 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9  2                   0.958                        0.0424 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10  2.25                0.952                        0.0476 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 11 more rows}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(flat\_probability\_plot)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch08_credit_risk_cds_files/figure-pdf/chapter08-flat-hazard-1.pdf}}

\section{6. CDS
Scheduleとカーブ}\label{cds-scheduleux3068ux30abux30fcux30d6}

Premiumは四半期ごとに支払われるものとする。単純な教育用例として、評価日の翌日から満期までのForward
Scheduleを作成する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cds\_schedule\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{Schedule}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  trade\_date\_flat }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L,}
\NormalTok{  maturity\_date\_flat,}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{period\_months\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{  weekend\_calendar,}
  \StringTok{"Following"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Unadjusted"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Forward"}\NormalTok{,}
  \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discount\_curve\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{flat\_curve\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{rate =}\NormalTok{ risk\_free\_rate\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ actual\_365,}
  \AttributeTok{compounding =} \StringTok{"Continuous"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discount\_curve\_handle\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{YieldTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  discount\_curve\_flat}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{hazard\_curve\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{FlatHazardRate}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  trade\_date\_flat,}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quote\_handle\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    hazard\_rate\_approximation}
\NormalTok{  ),}
\NormalTok{  actual\_365}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{hazard\_curve\_handle\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{DefaultProbabilityTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  hazard\_curve\_flat}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{flat\_curve\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"discount\_factor\_at\_maturity"}\NormalTok{,       discount\_curve\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{discount}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                          maturity\_date\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                        ),}
  \StringTok{"survival\_probability\_at\_maturity"}\NormalTok{, hazard\_curve\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{survivalProbability}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                          maturity\_date\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                        ),}
  \StringTok{"default\_probability\_to\_maturity"}\NormalTok{,  }\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                                        hazard\_curve\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{survivalProbability}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                          maturity\_date\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                        ),}
  \StringTok{"hazard\_rate\_at\_maturity"}\NormalTok{,          hazard\_curve\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{hazardRate}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                          maturity\_date\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                        )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{schedule\_table\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_schedule\_flat}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \StringTok{"CDS schedule: flat{-}curve example"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   period schedule\_date}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    \textless{}int\textgreater{} \textless{}date\textgreater{}       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1      1 2022{-}09{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2      2 2022{-}12{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3      3 2023{-}03{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4      4 2023{-}06{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5      5 2023{-}09{-}20}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  flat\_curve\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Flat discount and hazard{-}curve check"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                            value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                             \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 discount\_factor\_at\_maturity      0.905 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 survival\_probability\_at\_maturity 0.979 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 default\_probability\_to\_maturity  0.0215}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 hazard\_rate\_at\_maturity          0.0217}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{7. MidPoint CDS Engine}\label{midpoint-cds-engine}

MidPoint法では、各Premium期間中に発生するデフォルトを、その期間の中点で発生したものとして近似する。

100bp CouponのCDSを作成し、GaussQuantのMidPoint CDS Engineで評価する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cds\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{CreditDefaultSwap}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_buyer\_side\_GQL}\NormalTok{(),}
\NormalTok{  notional\_flat,}
\NormalTok{  contract\_coupon\_flat,}
\NormalTok{  cds\_schedule\_flat,}
  \StringTok{"Following"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  actual\_360}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{midpoint\_engine\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_midpoint\_engine\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{probability\_handle =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_curve\_handle\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_handle =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_handle\_flat}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{setPricingEngine}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  midpoint\_engine\_flat}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} NULL}

\NormalTok{cds\_flat\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_summary\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_flat\_leg\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,             }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"coupon\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,     cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{couponLegNPV}\NormalTok{(),}
  \StringTok{"default\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,    cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{defaultLegNPV}\NormalTok{(),}
  \StringTok{"sum\_of\_two\_legs"}\NormalTok{,    cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{couponLegNPV}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{                          cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{defaultLegNPV}\NormalTok{(),}
  \StringTok{"reported\_npv"}\NormalTok{,       GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                          cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{                        ),}
  \StringTok{"difference"}\NormalTok{,         GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                          cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{                        ) }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                          (}
\NormalTok{                            cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{couponLegNPV}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{                              cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{defaultLegNPV}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{                          )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_flat\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS summary: MidPoint engine with flat curves"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                 \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 npv              28116.    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 fair\_spread          0.0130}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 coupon\_leg\_npv  {-}94246.    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 default\_leg\_npv 122362.}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_flat\_leg\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS two{-}leg NPV check"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric            value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}             \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 coupon\_leg\_npv  {-}94246.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 default\_leg\_npv 122362.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 sum\_of\_two\_legs  28116.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 reported\_npv     28116.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 difference           0}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

プロテクション買い手から見て、Premium Legは負、Protection
Legは正となる。契約CouponがFair
Spreadより低ければ、プロテクション買い手に有利となり、CDS
NPVは一般に正となる。

\section{8.
CDSキャッシュフローと確率表}\label{cdsux30adux30e3ux30c3ux30b7ux30e5ux30d5ux30edux30fcux3068ux78baux7387ux8868}

GaussQuantの\texttt{cds\_cashflow\_table\_GQL()}を利用し、各Premium期間の割引係数、生存確率、デフォルト確率および期間中点の情報を確認する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_cashflow\_table\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{cds\_schedule =}\NormalTok{ cds\_schedule\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{protection\_start\_date =}\NormalTok{ cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{protectionStartDate}\NormalTok{(),}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ contract\_coupon\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{hazard\_curve =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_curve\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_curve =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{trade\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_flat}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS cash{-}flow and probability table"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 13}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   payment\_date coupon\_rate accrual\_start accrual\_end accrual\_days}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{} \textless{}chr\textgreater{}         \textless{}chr\textgreater{}              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 2022{-}09{-}20         NA    \textless{}NA\textgreater{}          2022{-}09{-}20            NA}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 2022{-}12{-}20          0.01 2022{-}09{-}20    2022{-}12{-}20            91}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 2023{-}03{-}20          0.01 2022{-}12{-}20    2023{-}03{-}20            90}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 2023{-}06{-}20          0.01 2023{-}03{-}20    2023{-}06{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 2023{-}09{-}20          0.01 2023{-}06{-}20    2023{-}09{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 8 more variables: accrual\_year\_fraction\_365 \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, coupon\_amount \textless{}dbl\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   discount\_factor \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, survival\_probability \textless{}dbl\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   default\_probability \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, midpoint\_date \textless{}chr\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   midpoint\_discount\_factor \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, midpoint\_survival\_probability \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{9. Premium
Legの手計算}\label{premium-legux306eux624bux8a08ux7b97}

Premium Legは、参照企業が各支払日まで存続した場合に支払われる。

単純化した現在価値は次式で表される。

\[
V_{\mathrm{premium}}
\approx
-Ns
\sum_i
\alpha_i
D(0,t_i)
Q(t_i)
\]

ここで、\(N\)はNotional、\(s\)は契約Coupon、\(\alpha_i\)は利息計算期間、\(D(0,t_i)\)は割引係数、\(Q(t_i)\)は生存確率である。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{premium\_leg\_hand\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_amount }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{discount\_factor }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{midpoint\_survival\_probability,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

この近似では期間中点の生存確率を使用している。実際のCDSでは、期間中にデフォルトした場合の経過PremiumであるAccrual
on defaultも考慮される。

\section{10. Protection
Legの手計算}\label{protection-legux306eux624bux8a08ux7b97}

期間 \((t_{i-1},t_i]\) にデフォルトする確率を、

\[
\Delta PD_i
=
Q(t_{i-1})-Q(t_i)
\]

とする。

Protection Legは、各期間の中点 \(m_i\)
で損失補償が支払われると近似する。

\[
V_{\mathrm{protection}}
\approx
N(1-R)
\sum_i
D(0,m_i)
\Delta PD_i
\]

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (}
  \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_flat}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{*}
  \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{midpoint\_discount\_factor }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{      cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{default\_probability,}
    \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{protection\_leg\_hand\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ notional\_flat }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{  protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_flat}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{11. Risky PV01とFair Spread}\label{risky-pv01ux3068fair-spread}

Risky PV01は、CDS Spreadを1単位支払うPremium Legの現在価値に相当する。

\[
RPV01
\approx
\sum_i
\alpha_i
D(0,t_i)
Q(t_i)
\]

Fair Spreadは、Premium LegとProtection
Legの価値を等しくし、UpfrontなしのCDS NPVをゼロにするRunning
Spreadである。

\[
s_{\mathrm{fair}}
=
\frac{
V_{\mathrm{protection}}/N
}{
RPV01
}
\]

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{risky\_pv01\_hand\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  (}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{accrual\_days }\SpecialCharTok{/}
      \DecValTok{360}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{discount\_factor }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_flat\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{midpoint\_survival\_probability,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fair\_spread\_hand\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_flat }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{  risky\_pv01\_hand\_flat}

\NormalTok{cds\_npv\_hand\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ premium\_leg\_hand\_flat }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  protection\_leg\_hand\_flat}

\NormalTok{flat\_hand\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,               }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{hand\_value,              }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{quantlib\_value,}
  \StringTok{"coupon\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,       premium\_leg\_hand\_flat,     cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{couponLegNPV}\NormalTok{(),}
  \StringTok{"default\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,      protection\_leg\_hand\_flat,  cds\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{defaultLegNPV}\NormalTok{(),}
  \StringTok{"cds\_npv"}\NormalTok{,              cds\_npv\_hand\_flat,         GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                                       cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                                     ),}
  \StringTok{"fair\_spread"}\NormalTok{,          fair\_spread\_hand\_flat,     GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_fair\_spread\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                                       cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                                     )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{difference =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{hand\_value }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{quantlib\_value}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{flat\_hand\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                    }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"risky\_pv01"}\NormalTok{,                risky\_pv01\_hand\_flat,}
  \StringTok{"protection\_leg\_per\_unit"}\NormalTok{,   protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_flat,}
  \StringTok{"hand\_fair\_spread"}\NormalTok{,          fair\_spread\_hand\_flat,}
  \StringTok{"quantlib\_fair\_spread"}\NormalTok{,      GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_fair\_spread\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                  cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                ),}
  \StringTok{"fair\_spread\_difference"}\NormalTok{,    fair\_spread\_hand\_flat }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                                  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_fair\_spread\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                    cds\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  flat\_hand\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS hand calculation and MidPoint engine comparison"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric           hand\_value quantlib\_value  difference}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                 \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}          \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}       \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 coupon\_leg\_npv  {-}94244.        {-}94246.     2.10       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 default\_leg\_npv 122362.        122362.     0          }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 cds\_npv          28118.         28116.     2.10       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 fair\_spread          0.0130         0.0130 0.000000289}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  flat\_hand\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS hand{-}calculation summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                        value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                         \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 risky\_pv01              0.942      }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 protection\_leg\_per\_unit 0.0122     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 hand\_fair\_spread        0.0130     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 quantlib\_fair\_spread    0.0130     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 fair\_spread\_difference  0.000000289}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

手計算とMidPoint
Engineは近い値となるが、厳密には一致しない。差にはAccrual on
default、日付規則、Protection開始日およびQuantLib内部の計算規約が含まれる。

\section{12. Zero-NPV CDSからHazard
Rateを推定する}\label{zero-npv-cdsux304bux3089hazard-rateux3092ux63a8ux5b9aux3059ux308b}

市場Spreadを契約Couponとして設定したCDSは、契約開始時点でNPVがゼロとなるようにHazard
Rateを調整できる。

ここでは、市場Spread 130bpのCDSについて、MidPoint
EngineのNPVがゼロとなるフラットHazard
Rateを\texttt{uniroot()}で推定する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cds\_market\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{CreditDefaultSwap}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_buyer\_side\_GQL}\NormalTok{(),}
\NormalTok{  notional\_flat,}
\NormalTok{  market\_spread\_flat,}
\NormalTok{  cds\_schedule\_flat,}
  \StringTok{"Following"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  actual\_360}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_market\_npv\_at\_hazard }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(hazard\_rate) \{}
\NormalTok{  engine }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_midpoint\_engine\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_flat,}
    \AttributeTok{hazard\_rate =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_rate,}
    \AttributeTok{discount\_rate =}\NormalTok{ risk\_free\_rate\_flat,}
    \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_flat,}
    \AttributeTok{day\_counter =} \StringTok{"Actual365Fixed"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  cds\_market\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{setPricingEngine}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    engine}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_market\_flat}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{hazard\_calibration\_result }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{uniroot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_market\_npv\_at\_hazard,}
  \AttributeTok{interval =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FloatTok{1e{-}8}\NormalTok{,}
    \FloatTok{0.50}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{tol =} \FloatTok{1e{-}10}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{hazard\_rate\_calibrated }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ hazard\_calibration\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{root}

\NormalTok{calibrated\_midpoint\_engine }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_midpoint\_engine\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{hazard\_rate =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_rate\_calibrated,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_rate =}\NormalTok{ risk\_free\_rate\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_flat,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =} \StringTok{"Actual365Fixed"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_market\_flat}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{setPricingEngine}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  calibrated\_midpoint\_engine}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} NULL}

\NormalTok{hazard\_calibration\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"market\_spread"}\NormalTok{,                market\_spread\_flat,}
  \StringTok{"simple\_hazard\_approximation"}\NormalTok{,  hazard\_rate\_approximation,}
  \StringTok{"calibrated\_hazard\_rate"}\NormalTok{,       hazard\_rate\_calibrated,}
  \StringTok{"zero\_npv\_check"}\NormalTok{,               GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                      cds\_market\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                    ),}
  \StringTok{"fair\_spread\_check"}\NormalTok{,            GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_fair\_spread\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                      cds\_market\_flat}
\NormalTok{                                    )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  hazard\_calibration\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Flat hazard calibration from a zero{-}NPV CDS"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                            value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                             \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 market\_spread               0.013      }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 simple\_hazard\_approximation 0.0217     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 calibrated\_hazard\_rate      0.0217     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 zero\_npv\_check              0.000000367}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 fair\_spread\_check           0.0130}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

単純近似 \(\lambda\approx s/(1-R)\)
とカリブレーション結果は近いが、支払頻度と割引の影響により差が生じる。

\section{13. SpreadとRecovery
Rateの感応度}\label{spreadux3068recovery-rateux306eux611fux5fdcux5ea6}

単純近似の下では、Spreadが高いほどHazard
Rateは高くなる。また、同じSpreadでRecovery
Rateを高く仮定すると、デフォルト時損失が小さくなるため、そのSpreadを説明するために必要なHazard
Rateは高くなる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{credit\_sensitivity\_input\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{crossing}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{market\_spread\_bp =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{,}
    \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{,}
    \DecValTok{200}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FloatTok{0.20}\NormalTok{,}
    \FloatTok{0.40}\NormalTok{,}
    \FloatTok{0.60}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{credit\_sensitivity\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ credit\_sensitivity\_input\_tbl }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{market\_spread =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{market\_spread\_bp }\SpecialCharTok{/}
      \DecValTok{10000}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{loss\_given\_default =} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{recovery\_rate,}
    \AttributeTok{hazard\_rate\_approx =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{market\_spread }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{loss\_given\_default,}
    \AttributeTok{survival\_probability\_5y =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}
      \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{5} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{hazard\_rate\_approx}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{cumulative\_default\_probability\_5y =} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{survival\_probability\_5y}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  credit\_sensitivity\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Spread and recovery{-}rate sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{30}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 9 x 7}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   market\_spread\_bp recovery\_rate market\_spread loss\_given\_default}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}         \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}         \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1               50           0.2         0.005                0.8}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2               50           0.4         0.005                0.6}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3               50           0.6         0.005                0.4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4              100           0.2         0.01                 0.8}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5              100           0.4         0.01                 0.6}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6              100           0.6         0.01                 0.4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 7              200           0.2         0.02                 0.8}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 8              200           0.4         0.02                 0.6}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 9              200           0.6         0.02                 0.4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 3 more variables: hazard\_rate\_approx \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, survival\_probability\_5y \textless{}dbl\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   cumulative\_default\_probability\_5y \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Recovery RateとHazard Rateは、CDS
Spreadだけから完全に独立して識別できない。実務ではRecovery
Rateを外生的に仮定し、その仮定の下でDefault Probability
Curveを構築することが多い。

\section{14.
標準CDSとCDS2015満期}\label{ux6a19ux6e96cdsux3068cds2015ux6e80ux671f}

標準CDSでは、満期を単純に取引日から5年後とするのではなく、CDS
IMM日とCDS2015ルールに従って決定する。

次の5年物CDSを考える。

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  取引日：2022年8月19日
\item
  市場Spread：30.426bp
\item
  契約Coupon：100bp
\item
  Notional：10,000,000
\item
  Recovery Rate：40\%
\item
  外生的なOIS割引率：0.25\%
\end{itemize}

第II-3章ではOISカーブの構築を扱った。本章の目的は信用カーブとCDS評価であるため、割引カーブの動学やブートストラップを繰り返さず、フラットOIS割引率を外生的に与える。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{trade\_date\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{date\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"2022{-}08{-}19"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{set\_eval\_date\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  trade\_date\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_tenor\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{period\_years\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{maturity\_date\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cdsMaturity}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  trade\_date\_isda,}
\NormalTok{  cds\_tenor\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"CDS2015"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{market\_spread\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{30.426} \SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{10000}
\NormalTok{contract\_coupon\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{100} \SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{10000}
\NormalTok{notional\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10000000}
\NormalTok{recovery\_rate\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.40}
\NormalTok{ois\_discount\_rate\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.0025}

\NormalTok{isda\_cds\_input\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{input,               }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"trade\_date"}\NormalTok{,          }\StringTok{"2022{-}08{-}19"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"cds\_tenor"}\NormalTok{,           }\StringTok{"5Y"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"maturity\_date"}\NormalTok{,       GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{iso\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                           maturity\_date\_isda}
\NormalTok{                         ),}
  \StringTok{"market\_spread\_bp"}\NormalTok{,    }\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                           market\_spread\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{*}
                             \DecValTok{10000}
\NormalTok{                         ),}
  \StringTok{"contract\_coupon\_bp"}\NormalTok{,  }\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                           contract\_coupon\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{*}
                             \DecValTok{10000}
\NormalTok{                         ),}
  \StringTok{"notional"}\NormalTok{,            }\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                           notional\_isda}
\NormalTok{                         ),}
  \StringTok{"recovery\_rate"}\NormalTok{,       }\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                           recovery\_rate\_isda}
\NormalTok{                         ),}
  \StringTok{"ois\_discount\_rate"}\NormalTok{,   }\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                           ois\_discount\_rate\_isda}
\NormalTok{                         )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_cds\_input\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"ISDA CDS input assumptions"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 8 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   input              value     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}              \textless{}chr\textgreater{}     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 trade\_date         2022{-}08{-}19}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 cds\_tenor          5Y        }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 maturity\_date      2027{-}06{-}20}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 market\_spread\_bp   30.426    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 contract\_coupon\_bp 100       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 notional           1e+07     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 7 recovery\_rate      0.4       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 8 ois\_discount\_rate  0.0025}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{15. 標準CDS2015 Schedule}\label{ux6a19ux6e96cds2015-schedule}

CDS2015ルールにより、Premium支払日は標準化された四半期日へ調整される。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cds\_calendar\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{WeekendsOnly}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{cds\_schedule\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{Schedule}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  trade\_date\_isda,}
\NormalTok{  maturity\_date\_isda,}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{period\_months\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{  cds\_calendar\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"Following"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Unadjusted"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"CDS2015"}\NormalTok{,}
  \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{schedule\_table\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_schedule\_isda}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \StringTok{"CDS schedule: 5Y CDS2015 example"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{30}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 21 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    period schedule\_date}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}     \textless{}int\textgreater{} \textless{}date\textgreater{}       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1      1 2022{-}06{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2      2 2022{-}09{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3      3 2022{-}12{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4      4 2023{-}03{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5      5 2023{-}06{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6      6 2023{-}09{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7      7 2023{-}12{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8      8 2024{-}03{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9      9 2024{-}06{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10     10 2024{-}09{-}20   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 11 more rows}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{16.
ISDA用割引カーブ}\label{isdaux7528ux5272ux5f15ux30abux30fcux30d6}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{discount\_curve\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{flat\_curve\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{rate =}\NormalTok{ ois\_discount\_rate\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ actual\_365,}
  \AttributeTok{compounding =} \StringTok{"Continuous"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discount\_curve\_handle\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{YieldTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  discount\_curve\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{isda\_discount\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                         }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"ois\_discount\_rate"}\NormalTok{,              ois\_discount\_rate\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"discount\_factor\_at\_maturity"}\NormalTok{,    discount\_curve\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{discount}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                       maturity\_date\_isda}
\NormalTok{                                     )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_discount\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"ISDA discount{-}curve check"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 2 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                       value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                        \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 ois\_discount\_rate           0.0025}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 discount\_factor\_at\_maturity 0.988}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{17. ISDA整合Hazard
Rateの推定}\label{isdaux6574ux5408hazard-rateux306eux63a8ux5b9a}

市場Spread 30.426bpをRunning Spreadとする標準CDSを作成し、ISDA
EngineのNPVがゼロとなるフラットHazard Rateを推定する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{market\_cds\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{make\_cds\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{maturity\_date =}\NormalTok{ maturity\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{running\_spread =}\NormalTok{ market\_spread\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{side =} \StringTok{"buyer"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{trade\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_tenor =} \StringTok{"3M"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =} \StringTok{"Actual360"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{date\_generation\_rule =} \StringTok{"CDS2015"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{isda\_market\_npv\_at\_hazard }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(hazard\_rate) \{}
\NormalTok{  probability\_handle }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{flat\_hazard\_rate\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{hazard\_rate =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_rate,}
    \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_isda,}
    \AttributeTok{day\_counter =} \StringTok{"Actual365Fixed"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  engine }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_isda\_engine\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{hazard\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ probability\_handle,}
    \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_isda,}
    \AttributeTok{discount\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_handle\_isda}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  market\_cds\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{setPricingEngine}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    engine}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    market\_cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{isda\_hazard\_calibration\_result }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{uniroot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_market\_npv\_at\_hazard,}
  \AttributeTok{interval =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FloatTok{1e{-}8}\NormalTok{,}
    \FloatTok{0.50}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{tol =} \FloatTok{1e{-}10}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{hazard\_rate\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ isda\_hazard\_calibration\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{root}

\NormalTok{hazard\_curve\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{FlatHazardRate}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  trade\_date\_isda,}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quote\_handle\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    hazard\_rate\_isda}
\NormalTok{  ),}
\NormalTok{  actual\_365}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{hazard\_curve\_handle\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{DefaultProbabilityTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  hazard\_curve\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{isda\_hazard\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                         }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"market\_spread"}\NormalTok{,                  market\_spread\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"recovery\_rate"}\NormalTok{,                  recovery\_rate\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"implied\_hazard\_rate"}\NormalTok{,            hazard\_rate\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"simple\_hazard\_approximation"}\NormalTok{,    market\_spread\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{                                      (}
                                        \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                                          recovery\_rate\_isda}
\NormalTok{                                      ),}
  \StringTok{"survival\_probability\_at\_maturity"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  hazard\_curve\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{survivalProbability}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    maturity\_date\_isda}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \StringTok{"default\_probability\_to\_maturity"}\NormalTok{,}
  \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{    hazard\_curve\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{survivalProbability}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      maturity\_date\_isda}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_hazard\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"ISDA implied hazard{-}rate check"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 6 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                             value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 market\_spread                    0.00304}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 recovery\_rate                    0.4    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 implied\_hazard\_rate              0.00514}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 simple\_hazard\_approximation      0.00507}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 survival\_probability\_at\_maturity 0.975  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 default\_probability\_to\_maturity  0.0246}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

市場SpreadとRecovery Rateから得られる単純近似と、ISDA
EngineでゼロNPVとなるHazard Rateには差が生じる。標準CDSの日付、Accrual
on default、割引および数値積分が評価へ反映されるためである。

\section{18. ISDA CDS Engine}\label{isda-cds-engine}

契約Couponを標準Coupon 100bpへ固定した5年物CDSを評価する。

市場Spreadは30.426bpであり、契約Coupon
100bpより低い。プロテクション買い手は市場水準より高いPremiumを支払うため、Running
Couponだけで評価すると一般に負のNPVとなる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{isda\_engine }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_isda\_engine\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{hazard\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_curve\_handle\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_handle\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{make\_cds\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{maturity\_date =}\NormalTok{ maturity\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{running\_spread =}\NormalTok{ contract\_coupon\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{side =} \StringTok{"buyer"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{trade\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_tenor =} \StringTok{"3M"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =} \StringTok{"Actual360"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{date\_generation\_rule =} \StringTok{"CDS2015"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{pricing\_engine =}\NormalTok{ isda\_engine}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_isda\_summary\_base\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_summary\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_isda\_summary\_base\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"ISDA CDS base summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                  value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                   \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 npv             {-}334963.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 fair\_spread           0.00304}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 coupon\_leg\_npv  {-}498392.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 default\_leg\_npv  146485.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{19. Accrual
rebateとNPV分解}\label{accrual-rebateux3068npvux5206ux89e3}

標準CDSでは、取引日が前回の標準Coupon日と次回Coupon日の間にある場合、契約開始時にAccrual
rebateが発生することがある。

この場合、プロテクション買い手から見たNPVは、

\[
V_{\mathrm{CDS}}
=
V_{\mathrm{coupon}}
+
V_{\mathrm{default}}
+
V_{\mathrm{accrual\ rebate}}
\]

となる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{coupon\_leg\_npv\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cds\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{couponLegNPV}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{default\_leg\_npv\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cds\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{defaultLegNPV}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{accrual\_rebate\_npv\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{accrualRebateNPV}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{three\_component\_sum\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leg\_npv\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  default\_leg\_npv\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  accrual\_rebate\_npv\_isda}

\NormalTok{isda\_leg\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,               }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"coupon\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,       coupon\_leg\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"default\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,      default\_leg\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"accrual\_rebate\_npv"}\NormalTok{,   accrual\_rebate\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"three\_component\_sum"}\NormalTok{,  three\_component\_sum\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"reported\_npv"}\NormalTok{,         GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                            cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{                          ),}
  \StringTok{"difference"}\NormalTok{,           GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                            cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{                          ) }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                            three\_component\_sum\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_leg\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"ISDA CDS NPV decomposition"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 6 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                 value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                  \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 coupon\_leg\_npv      {-}498392.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 default\_leg\_npv      146485.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 accrual\_rebate\_npv    16944.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 three\_component\_sum {-}334963.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 reported\_npv        {-}334963.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 difference                0}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{20. Fair SpreadとFair
Upfront}\label{fair-spreadux3068fair-upfront}

Fair Spreadは、Upfrontを授受せずにCDS NPVをゼロとするRunning
Spreadである。

Fair
Upfrontは、契約Couponを標準Couponへ固定したまま、契約価値を調整するために開始時点で授受するNotional比率である。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fair\_spread\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_fair\_spread\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fair\_upfront\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{fairUpfront}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fair\_upfront\_amount\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fair\_upfront\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{  notional\_isda}

\NormalTok{isda\_cds\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"coupon\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,          coupon\_leg\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"default\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,         default\_leg\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"accrual\_rebate\_npv"}\NormalTok{,      accrual\_rebate\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"cds\_npv"}\NormalTok{,                 GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                               cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{                             ),}
  \StringTok{"market\_spread"}\NormalTok{,           market\_spread\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"contract\_coupon"}\NormalTok{,         contract\_coupon\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"fair\_spread"}\NormalTok{,             fair\_spread\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"fair\_upfront"}\NormalTok{,            fair\_upfront\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"fair\_upfront\_amount"}\NormalTok{,     fair\_upfront\_amount\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"hazard\_rate"}\NormalTok{,             hazard\_rate\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_cds\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS summary: ISDA engine"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{30}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 10 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    metric                      value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                       \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1 coupon\_leg\_npv      {-}498392.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2 default\_leg\_npv      146485.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3 accrual\_rebate\_npv    16944.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4 cds\_npv             {-}334963.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5 market\_spread             0.00304}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6 contract\_coupon           0.01   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7 fair\_spread               0.00304}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8 fair\_upfront             {-}0.0335 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9 fair\_upfront\_amount {-}334974.     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10 hazard\_rate               0.00514}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

この例では、契約Couponが市場Spreadより高いため、プロテクション買い手は市場より多くのPremiumを支払う。したがって、契約開始時の価値を調整するUpfrontが必要となる。

Fair
Upfrontの正負は、QuantLibにおけるBuyer／Sellerの符号規約と契約設定に依存する。符号だけで判断せず、CDS
NPV、契約Coupon、Fair
SpreadおよびUpfront金額を一緒に確認する必要がある。

\section{21.
ISDA用キャッシュフロー表}\label{isdaux7528ux30adux30e3ux30c3ux30b7ux30e5ux30d5ux30edux30fcux8868}

標準CDS2015 Schedule、ISDA整合Hazard
Curveおよび割引カーブから、Premium期間ごとの確率情報を作成する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_cashflow\_table\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{cds\_schedule =}\NormalTok{ cds\_schedule\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{protection\_start\_date =}\NormalTok{ cds\_isda}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{protectionStartDate}\NormalTok{(),}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ contract\_coupon\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{hazard\_curve =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_curve\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_curve =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{trade\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"CDS cash{-}flow table: CDS2015 example"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{30}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 21 x 13}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    payment\_date coupon\_rate accrual\_start accrual\_end accrual\_days}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    \textless{}chr\textgreater{}              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{} \textless{}chr\textgreater{}         \textless{}chr\textgreater{}              \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1 2022{-}08{-}19         NA    \textless{}NA\textgreater{}          2022{-}08{-}19            NA}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2 2022{-}09{-}20          0.01 2022{-}06{-}20    2022{-}09{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3 2022{-}12{-}20          0.01 2022{-}09{-}20    2022{-}12{-}20            91}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4 2023{-}03{-}20          0.01 2022{-}12{-}20    2023{-}03{-}20            90}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5 2023{-}06{-}20          0.01 2023{-}03{-}20    2023{-}06{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6 2023{-}09{-}20          0.01 2023{-}06{-}20    2023{-}09{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7 2023{-}12{-}20          0.01 2023{-}09{-}20    2023{-}12{-}20            91}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8 2024{-}03{-}20          0.01 2023{-}12{-}20    2024{-}03{-}20            91}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9 2024{-}06{-}20          0.01 2024{-}03{-}20    2024{-}06{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10 2024{-}09{-}20          0.01 2024{-}06{-}20    2024{-}09{-}20            92}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 11 more rows}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 8 more variables: accrual\_year\_fraction\_365 \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, coupon\_amount \textless{}dbl\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   discount\_factor \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, survival\_probability \textless{}dbl\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   default\_probability \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, midpoint\_date \textless{}chr\textgreater{},}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \#   midpoint\_discount\_factor \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}, midpoint\_survival\_probability \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

この表はCDSの経済構造を理解するためのMidPoint型分解である。ISDA
Engineは、標準日付、Accrual on
default、数値積分および曲線補間をより厳密に扱うため、この表から得られる単純近似と完全には一致しない。

\section{22. MidPoint型近似とISDA
Engine}\label{midpointux578bux8fd1ux4f3cux3068isda-engine}

ISDA用キャッシュフロー表から、Premium Leg、Protection
Leg、RPV01およびFair Spreadを簡易計算する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{premium\_leg\_hand\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_amount }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{discount\_factor }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{midpoint\_survival\_probability,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (}
  \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{    recovery\_rate\_isda}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{*}
  \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{midpoint\_discount\_factor }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{      cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{default\_probability,}
    \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{protection\_leg\_hand\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ notional\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{  protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_isda}

\NormalTok{risky\_pv01\_hand\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  (}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{accrual\_days }\SpecialCharTok{/}
      \DecValTok{360}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{discount\_factor }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{    cds\_cashflow\_isda\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{midpoint\_survival\_probability,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fair\_spread\_hand\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ protection\_leg\_per\_unit\_hand\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{  risky\_pv01\_hand\_isda}

\NormalTok{cds\_npv\_hand\_isda }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ premium\_leg\_hand\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  protection\_leg\_hand\_isda }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  accrual\_rebate\_npv\_isda}

\NormalTok{isda\_hand\_check\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,              }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{hand\_value,                 }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{isda\_value,}
  \StringTok{"coupon\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,      premium\_leg\_hand\_isda,        coupon\_leg\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"default\_leg\_npv"}\NormalTok{,     protection\_leg\_hand\_isda,     default\_leg\_npv\_isda,}
  \StringTok{"cds\_npv"}\NormalTok{,             cds\_npv\_hand\_isda,            GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                                        cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{                                                      ),}
  \StringTok{"fair\_spread"}\NormalTok{,         fair\_spread\_hand\_isda,        fair\_spread\_isda}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{difference =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{hand\_value }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{isda\_value}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  isda\_hand\_check\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"MidPoint{-}style approximation and ISDA comparison"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric             hand\_value    isda\_value difference}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                   \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}         \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 coupon\_leg\_npv  {-}498112.      {-}498392.      280.      }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 default\_leg\_npv  146486.       146485.        0.194   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 cds\_npv         {-}334682.      {-}334963.      280.      }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 fair\_spread           0.00294       0.00304  {-}0.000102}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{23. MidPoint EngineとISDA
Engineの比較}\label{midpoint-engineux3068isda-engineux306eux6bd4ux8f03}

同じHazard Curve、Recovery
Rate、割引カーブおよび標準Couponを使用し、MidPoint EngineとISDA
Engineの評価差を確認する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{midpoint\_engine\_isda\_inputs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_midpoint\_engine\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{probability\_handle =}\NormalTok{ hazard\_curve\_handle\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{recovery\_rate =}\NormalTok{ recovery\_rate\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_handle =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_handle\_isda}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{cds\_midpoint\_standard }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{make\_cds\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{maturity\_date =}\NormalTok{ maturity\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{running\_spread =}\NormalTok{ contract\_coupon\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{side =} \StringTok{"buyer"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{trade\_date =}\NormalTok{ trade\_date\_isda,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_tenor =} \StringTok{"3M"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =} \StringTok{"Actual360"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{date\_generation\_rule =} \StringTok{"CDS2015"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{pricing\_engine =}\NormalTok{ midpoint\_engine\_isda\_inputs}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{midpoint\_standard\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_summary\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_midpoint\_standard}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{engine =} \StringTok{"MidPoint"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{isda\_standard\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cds\_summary\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  cds\_isda}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{engine =} \StringTok{"ISDA"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{engine\_comparison\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  midpoint\_standard\_summary\_tbl,}
\NormalTok{  isda\_standard\_summary\_tbl}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{relocate}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{engine}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ engine,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ value}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{difference\_isda\_minus\_midpoint =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ISDA }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{MidPoint}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  engine\_comparison\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"MidPoint and ISDA CDS engine comparison"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric               MidPoint          ISDA difference\_isda\_minus\_midpoint}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                   \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}         \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}                          \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 npv             {-}334951.      {-}334963.                            {-}1.17e+1}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 fair\_spread           0.00304       0.00304                       {-}7.66e{-}8}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 coupon\_leg\_npv  {-}498380.      {-}498392.                            {-}1.15e+1}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 default\_leg\_npv  146486.       146485.                            {-}1.94e{-}1}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

MidPoint法は、各Premium期間内のデフォルト時点を期間中点へ集約する。ISDA
Engineは標準市場規約に合わせて、より詳細な日付処理と積分を行う。そのため、同じカーブを用いてもLeg
NPVとFair Spreadに差が生じる。

\section{24. まとめ}\label{ux307eux3068ux3081-11}

CDSは、Premium LegとProtection
Legから構成される。プロテクション買い手はPremiumを支払い、信用事由が発生した場合に損失補償を受け取る。

Hazard
Rateは、企業がその時点まで存続しているという条件の下での瞬間的なデフォルト強度である。フラットHazard
Rateでは、生存確率は次式で表される。

\[
Q(t)
=
e^{-\lambda t}
\]

Recovery Rate \(R\) を仮定すると、CDS SpreadとHazard Rateには、

\[
\lambda
\approx
\frac{s}{1-R}
\]

という近似関係がある。ただし、厳密なHazard
Rateは、Premium支払日、割引、Accrual on
defaultおよび標準CDS規約を反映して推定する。

Premium Legの単位Spread当たり現在価値がRisky PV01であり、Fair
SpreadはProtection Legの単位Notional価値をRisky PV01で割って求められる。

MidPoint
Engineは、デフォルト時点を各期間の中点で近似するため、CDS評価の構造を理解しやすい。ISDA
Engineは、標準CDS2015の日付、Accrual rebate、Accrual on
defaultおよび市場規約をより厳密に扱う。

標準Couponと市場Spreadが異なる場合、Running
Couponだけでは契約価値がゼロにならない。この差を契約開始時に調整するものがFair
Upfrontである。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{chapter08\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{section,                     }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{main\_result,}
  \StringTok{"Hazard Rate"}\NormalTok{,                }\StringTok{"Survival and cumulative default probabilities"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"MidPoint CDS"}\NormalTok{,               }\StringTok{"Premium and protection leg decomposition"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Hazard calibration"}\NormalTok{,         }\StringTok{"Zero{-}NPV market CDS"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"CDS2015"}\NormalTok{,                    }\StringTok{"Standard maturity and coupon schedule"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"ISDA CDS"}\NormalTok{,                   }\StringTok{"Fair spread, upfront, and accrual rebate"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Engine comparison"}\NormalTok{,          }\StringTok{"MidPoint approximation versus ISDA pricing"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  chapter08\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Chapter II{-}8 summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 6 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   section            main\_result                                  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}              \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                                        }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 Hazard Rate        Survival and cumulative default probabilities}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 MidPoint CDS       Premium and protection leg decomposition     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 Hazard calibration Zero{-}NPV market CDS                          }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 CDS2015            Standard maturity and coupon schedule        }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 ISDA CDS           Fair spread, upfront, and accrual rebate     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 Engine comparison  MidPoint approximation versus ISDA pricing}

\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{Chapter II{-}8 Credit risk and CDS completed successfully.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} }

\chapter{第II-9章
エキゾチック・デリバティブとPRDC}\label{ux7b2cii-9ux7ae0-ux30a8ux30adux30beux30c1ux30c3ux30afux30c7ux30eaux30d0ux30c6ux30a3ux30d6ux3068prdc}

FX連動CouponとMonte Carlo評価

\hfill\break

\chapter{第II-9章
エキゾチック・デリバティブとPRDC}\label{ux7b2cii-9ux7ae0-ux30a8ux30adux30beux30c1ux30c3ux30afux30c7ux30eaux30d0ux30c6ux30a3ux30d6ux3068prdc-1}

これまでの章では、債券、金利先物、Swap、Option、Callable
BondおよびCDSを、それぞれの主要なリスク要因に基づいて評価した。本章では、第II部の締めくくりとして、金利と為替を組み合わせたエキゾチック・デリバティブであるPRDCを検討する。

PRDC（Power Reverse Dual Currency
Note）は、為替レートに連動するCouponを支払う長期の仕組債である。典型的なCoupon
rateは、次の形で表される。

\[
C(S_t)
=
\min
\left[
C_{\max},
\max
\left(
a\frac{S_t}{S_0}-b,
C_{\min}
\right)
\right]
\]

ここで、

\begin{itemize}
\item
  \(S_t\) はCoupon決定日における為替レート
\item
  \(S_0\) はCoupon計算上の基準為替レート
\item
  \(a\) は為替連動係数
\item
  \(b\) は固定控除率
\item
  \(C_{\min}\) はCoupon Floor
\item
  \(C_{\max}\) はCoupon Cap
\end{itemize}

である。

為替レートが上昇するとCoupon
rateは増加するが、FloorとCapによって下限と上限が制限される。したがって、PRDC
CouponはFX
Spotに対して区分線形である一方、将来価値は為替分布に依存する非線形商品となる。

本章では、Domestic金利、Foreign金利およびFX
volatilityを一定とするGarman--Kohlhagenモデルを用いて、将来のCoupon日ごとにFXパスを生成する。各パスでCouponを計算し、その平均値からCoupon
LegとRedemption Legの現在価値を求める。

実際のPRDCには、発行体の期限前償還権を含むことが多い。本章では商品の基本構造を明確にするため、\textbf{発行体コール権を含まない非Callable
PRDC}を評価する。Callable
PRDCには、金利・為替の複数因子モデル、相関構造およびLeast-Squares Monte
Carloなどが追加で必要となる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{opts\_chunk}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{set}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{collapse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{comment =} \StringTok{"\#\textgreater{}"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{warning =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{message =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}


\FunctionTok{suppressPackageStartupMessages}\NormalTok{(\{}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(ggthemes)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(QuantLib)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(GaussQuant)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)}
  \FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(broom)}
\NormalTok{\})}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{1. 商品条件}\label{ux5546ux54c1ux6761ux4ef6}

2015年9月3日から2041年9月3日まで、半年ごとにCouponを支払うPRDCを考える。最初の1年間は固定Couponとし、その後はFX連動Couponへ移行する。

評価日は2023年4月11日であるため、固定Intro
Coupon期間はすでに終了している。ただし、GaussQuantのPRDC評価関数がIntro
Couponを扱えることを確認するため、契約条件として残す。

本章では、計算時間を抑えながらMonte
Carlo評価を確認するため、基準評価のパス数を3,000本、感応度評価を1,000本とする。
