\section{3. Domestic、ForeignおよびDiscount
Curve}\label{domesticforeignux304aux3088ux3073discount-curve}

FX Quoteを、外国通貨1単位当たりの円貨額として表す。

\[
S_t
=
\text{JPY per unit of foreign currency}
\]

このとき、

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  Domestic CurveはJPY金利
\item
  Foreign Curveは外国通貨金利
\end{itemize}

である。

Garman--Kohlhagenモデルのリスク中立ドリフトには、Domestic金利とForeign金利の差を使用する。

\[
\frac{dS_t}{S_t}
=
(r_d-r_f)dt
+
\sigma_{\mathrm{FX}}dW_t
\]

本例では、Domestic金利を1\%、Foreign金利を3\%とする。そのため、リスク中立測度の下でのFXドリフトは年率マイナス2\%となる。

Couponと元本の現在価値には、担保またはファンディング条件を表す外生的な割引率0.5\%を使用する。これは簡略化した設定であり、本格的な評価ではDomestic
OIS CurveとCollateral条件を整合させる必要がある。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fx\_day\_counter\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{Actual360}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{domestic\_curve\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{flat\_curve\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_ql\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{rate =}\NormalTok{ domestic\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{compounding =} \StringTok{"Continuous"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{foreign\_curve\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{flat\_curve\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_ql\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{rate =}\NormalTok{ foreign\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{compounding =} \StringTok{"Continuous"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discount\_curve\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{flat\_curve\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{reference\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_ql\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{rate =}\NormalTok{ discount\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{compounding =} \StringTok{"Continuous"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{domestic\_curve\_handle\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{YieldTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  domestic\_curve\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{foreign\_curve\_handle\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{YieldTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  foreign\_curve\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discount\_curve\_handle\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{YieldTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  discount\_curve\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{curve\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{curve,                 }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{flat\_rate,}
  \StringTok{"Domestic FX curve"}\NormalTok{,     domestic\_rate\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"Foreign FX curve"}\NormalTok{,      foreign\_rate\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC discount curve"}\NormalTok{,   discount\_rate\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"FX risk{-}neutral drift"}\NormalTok{, domestic\_rate\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                             foreign\_rate\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  curve\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC flat{-}curve assumptions"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   curve                 flat\_rate}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                     \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 Domestic FX curve         0.01 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 Foreign FX curve          0.03 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 PRDC discount curve       0.005}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 FX risk{-}neutral drift    {-}0.02}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{4. FX Process}\label{fx-process}

FX volatilityを10\%とし、Garman--Kohlhagen Processを作成する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fx\_volatility\_curve\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{BlackConstantVol}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  valuation\_date\_ql\_prdc,}
\NormalTok{  QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{NullCalendar}\NormalTok{(),}
\NormalTok{  GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quote\_handle\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fx\_volatility\_prdc}
\NormalTok{  ),}
\NormalTok{  fx\_day\_counter\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fx\_volatility\_handle\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{BlackVolTermStructureHandle}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  fx\_volatility\_curve\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fx\_process\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{fx\_process\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{spot =}\NormalTok{ fx\_spot\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{foreign\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ foreign\_curve\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{domestic\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ domestic\_curve\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{volatility\_handle =}\NormalTok{ fx\_volatility\_handle\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fx\_market\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,               }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"fx\_spot"}\NormalTok{,              fx\_spot\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"fx\_volatility"}\NormalTok{,        fx\_volatility\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"domestic\_rate"}\NormalTok{,        domestic\_rate\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"foreign\_rate"}\NormalTok{,         foreign\_rate\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"risk\_neutral\_drift"}\NormalTok{,   domestic\_rate\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{                            foreign\_rate\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  fx\_market\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC FX market assumptions"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric              value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}               \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 fx\_spot            133.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 fx\_volatility        0.1 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 domestic\_rate        0.01}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 foreign\_rate         0.03}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 risk\_neutral\_drift  {-}0.02}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{5. Coupon Payoff}\label{coupon-payoff}

本例のFX連動Couponは次式である。

\[
C(S)
=
\min
\left[
2.2\%,
\max
\left(
12.2\%
\frac{S}{120}
-
10\%,
0
\right)
\right]
\]

Floorに到達するFX水準は、

\[
S_{\mathrm{floor}}
=
S_0
\frac{
b+C_{\min}
}{
a
}
\]

Capに到達するFX水準は、

\[
S_{\mathrm{cap}}
=
S_0
\frac{
b+C_{\max}
}{
a
}
\]

である。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fx\_floor\_threshold\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{  (}
\NormalTok{    coupon\_subtraction\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{      coupon\_floor\_prdc}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{  coupon\_leverage\_prdc}

\NormalTok{fx\_cap\_threshold\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{  (}
\NormalTok{    coupon\_subtraction\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{      coupon\_cap\_prdc}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{  coupon\_leverage\_prdc}

\NormalTok{fx\_payoff\_grid\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_rate =} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}
    \DecValTok{70}\NormalTok{,}
    \DecValTok{180}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{by =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{uncapped\_coupon =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fx\_rate }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{      coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}
\NormalTok{      coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
    \AttributeTok{coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_coupon\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{fx\_rate =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fx\_rate,}
      \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
      \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
      \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
      \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
      \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{coupon\_threshold\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{threshold,       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{fx\_rate,}
  \StringTok{"floor\_threshold"}\NormalTok{, fx\_floor\_threshold\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"cap\_threshold"}\NormalTok{,   fx\_cap\_threshold\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"current\_spot"}\NormalTok{,    fx\_spot\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{prdc\_payoff\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  fx\_payoff\_grid\_tbl,}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fx\_rate,}
    \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_rate}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.8}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_vline}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{xintercept =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      fx\_floor\_threshold\_prdc,}
\NormalTok{      fx\_cap\_threshold\_prdc}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{scale\_y\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{percent\_format}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{accuracy =} \FloatTok{0.1}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"PRDC coupon payoff"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Floored and capped FX{-}linked coupon"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"FX rate"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Coupon rate"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  coupon\_threshold\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC coupon FX thresholds"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 3 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   threshold       fx\_rate}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}             \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 floor\_threshold    98.4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 cap\_threshold     120  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 current\_spot      133.}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  fx\_payoff\_grid\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC coupon payoff table"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{60}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 56 x 3}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    fx\_rate uncapped\_coupon coupon\_rate}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}           \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}       \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1      70         {-}0.0288           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2      72         {-}0.0268           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3      74         {-}0.0248           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4      76         {-}0.0227           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5      78         {-}0.0207           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6      80         {-}0.0187           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7      82         {-}0.0166           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8      84         {-}0.0146           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9      86         {-}0.0126           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10      88         {-}0.0105           0}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 46 more rows}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(prdc\_payoff\_plot)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch09_exotic_derivatives_prdc_files/figure-pdf/chapter09-coupon-payoff-1.pdf}}

現在のFX
SpotはCap到達水準を上回っているため、評価時点のCoupon式だけを見ればCapに張り付いている。しかし、満期までのFX分布にはFloor、Linear領域およびCap領域のすべてが含まれ得る。

\section{6.
Coupon日ベースのFX時間グリッド}\label{couponux65e5ux30d9ux30fcux30b9ux306efxux6642ux9593ux30b0ux30eaux30c3ux30c9}

PRDC評価に必要なのは、評価日より後に到来するCoupon日である。GaussQuantの\texttt{fx\_path\_generator\_GQL()}は、実際のCoupon日を用いて不均一な時間間隔を保持する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fx\_path\_generator\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{fx\_path\_generator\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{valuation\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_schedule =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_schedule\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{process =}\NormalTok{ fx\_process\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{time\_grid\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_number =} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{remaining\_coupon\_dates}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_date =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{remaining\_coupon\_dates,}
  \AttributeTok{time\_from\_valuation =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_times,}
  \AttributeTok{time\_step =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{time\_steps}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{path\_generator\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"remaining\_coupon\_dates"}\NormalTok{,  }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                               fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{remaining\_coupon\_dates}
\NormalTok{                             ),}
  \StringTok{"number\_of\_steps"}\NormalTok{,         fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{number\_of\_steps,}
  \StringTok{"first\_coupon\_time"}\NormalTok{,       }\FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                               fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_times}
\NormalTok{                             ),}
  \StringTok{"final\_coupon\_time"}\NormalTok{,       }\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                               fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_times}
\NormalTok{                             )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  path\_generator\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC FX path{-}generator summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 4 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                  value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                   \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 remaining\_coupon\_dates 37    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 number\_of\_steps        37    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 first\_coupon\_time       0.406}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 final\_coupon\_time      18.7}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  time\_grid\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC remaining coupon{-}date time grid"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{60}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 37 x 4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    coupon\_number coupon\_date time\_from\_valuation time\_step}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}            \textless{}int\textgreater{} \textless{}date\textgreater{}                    \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}     \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1             1 2023{-}09{-}04                0.406     0.406}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2             2 2024{-}03{-}04                0.911     0.506}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3             3 2024{-}09{-}03                1.42      0.508}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4             4 2025{-}03{-}03                1.92      0.503}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5             5 2025{-}09{-}03                2.43      0.511}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6             6 2026{-}03{-}03                2.94      0.503}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7             7 2026{-}09{-}03                3.45      0.511}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8             8 2027{-}03{-}03                3.95      0.503}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9             9 2027{-}09{-}03                4.46      0.511}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10            10 2028{-}03{-}03                4.97      0.506}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 27 more rows}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

QuantLibの\texttt{StochasticProcess1D\$evolve()}へは標準正規変量を渡す。Brownian
incrementを外側で二重に時間調整してはならない。GaussQuantのPath
Generatorでは、標準正規乱数と各Coupon間の実際の時間差を分けて処理している。

\section{7.
サンプルFXパス}\label{ux30b5ux30f3ux30d7ux30ebfxux30d1ux30b9}

Monte
Carlo評価へ進む前に、20本のFXパスを生成し、将来のFX分布とCouponの動きを確認する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{sample\_path\_count\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L}

\NormalTok{sample\_fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_path\_matrix\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{path\_generator =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{n\_paths =}\NormalTok{ sample\_path\_count\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ random\_seed\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{sample\_fx\_path\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{ncol}\NormalTok{(sample\_fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc)}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path\_id) \{}
\NormalTok{    path\_values }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ sample\_fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc[}
\NormalTok{      ,}
\NormalTok{      path\_id}
\NormalTok{    ]}

\NormalTok{    tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{path\_id =}\NormalTok{ path\_id,}
      \AttributeTok{coupon\_number =} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        path\_values}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \AttributeTok{coupon\_date =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{remaining\_coupon\_dates,}
      \AttributeTok{time =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_times,}
      \AttributeTok{fx\_rate =}\NormalTok{ path\_values,}
      \AttributeTok{coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_coupon\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{fx\_rate =}\NormalTok{ path\_values,}
        \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
        \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
        \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
        \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
        \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{sample\_fx\_path\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  sample\_fx\_path\_tbl,}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{time,}
    \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fx\_rate,}
    \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{path\_id}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.7}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Sample FX paths for PRDC valuation"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Time from valuation date (years)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"FX rate"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  sample\_fx\_path\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Sample PRDC FX and coupon paths"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{40}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 40 x 6}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    path\_id coupon\_number coupon\_date  time fx\_rate coupon\_rate}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}      \textless{}int\textgreater{}         \textless{}int\textgreater{} \textless{}date\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}   \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}       \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1       1             1 2023{-}09{-}04  0.406    127.       0.022}

\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6       1             6 2026{-}03{-}03  2.94     150.       0.022}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7       1             7 2026{-}09{-}03  3.45     154.       0.022}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8       1             8 2027{-}03{-}03  3.95     139.       0.022}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9       1             9 2027{-}09{-}03  4.46     130.       0.022}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10       1            10 2028{-}03{-}03  4.97     125.       0.022}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 30 more rows}

\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch09_exotic_derivatives_prdc_files/figure-pdf/chapter09-sample-paths-1.pdf}}

\section{8. Monte
CarloによるPRDC評価}\label{monte-carloux306bux3088ux308bprdcux8a55ux4fa1}

各Coupon日の期待Coupon rateは、Monte Carloによって次のように近似する。

\[
E[C(S_{t_i})]
\approx
\frac{1}{M}
\sum_{j=1}^{M}
C(S_{t_i}^{(j)})
\]

ここで、\(M\)はパス数、\(S_{t_i}^{(j)}\)はパス \(j\) におけるCoupon日
\(t_i\) のFX Rateである。

各Coupon cash flowは、

\[
CF_i
=
N_0\alpha_iE[C(S_{t_i})]
\]

であり、PRDC現在価値は、

\[
PV_{\mathrm{PRDC}}
=
\sum_i
D(0,t_i)CF_i
+
D(0,T)N_0
\]

となる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{prdc\_result }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_npv\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{valuation\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_schedule =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_schedule\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{process =}\NormalTok{ fx\_process\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_curve =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_dates =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_dates\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{n\_paths =}\NormalTok{ number\_of\_paths\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ random\_seed\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{redemption\_amount =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{return\_details =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ prdc\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{path\_matrix}

\NormalTok{prdc\_cashflow\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ prdc\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cashflows}

\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{    value}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{    .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{metric }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"redemption\_leg\_npv"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    value}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{prdc\_present\_value\_jpy }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ prdc\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{npv}

\NormalTok{prdc\_valuation\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{metric,                    }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{value,}
  \StringTok{"coupon\_leg\_pv\_jpy"}\NormalTok{,         coupon\_leg\_present\_value\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"redemption\_leg\_pv\_jpy"}\NormalTok{,     redemption\_present\_value\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"total\_pv\_jpy"}\NormalTok{,              prdc\_present\_value\_jpy,}
  \StringTok{"pv\_as\_percent\_of\_notional"}\NormalTok{, prdc\_present\_value\_jpy }\SpecialCharTok{/}
\NormalTok{                                  notional\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"number\_of\_paths"}\NormalTok{,           number\_of\_paths\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"number\_of\_coupon\_steps"}\NormalTok{,    }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                  fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc}
\NormalTok{                                )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  prdc\_valuation\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC Monte Carlo valuation summary"}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 redemption\_leg\_pv\_jpy     273266946.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 total\_pv\_jpy              334557294.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 pv\_as\_percent\_of\_notional         1.12}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 number\_of\_paths                3000   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 number\_of\_coupon\_steps           37}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

本章の元本償還額は固定されているため、Redemption
Legは割引率に依存するがFXには依存しない。FX SpotとFX
volatilityの影響は、主にCoupon Legを通じて現れる。

\section{9.
期待Couponとキャッシュフロー}\label{ux671fux5f85couponux3068ux30adux30e3ux30c3ux30b7ux30e5ux30d5ux30edux30fc}

\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

長期のFX期待値はDomestic金利とForeign金利の差の影響を受ける。本例ではForeign金利がDomestic金利より高いため、リスク中立測度の下ではFX
Rateに下向きのドリフトが働く。その結果、満期が長くなるほどCap領域からLinear領域またはFloor領域へ移る確率が高くなる。

\section{10.
期待Couponの期間構造}\label{ux671fux5f85couponux306eux671fux9593ux69cbux9020}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

    \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{final\_coupon\_rate}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Expected PRDC coupon rates"}\NormalTok{,}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch09_exotic_derivatives_prdc_files/figure-pdf/chapter09-expected-coupon-plot-1.pdf}}

期待Couponは、単に期待FXをCoupon式へ代入した値とは一般に一致しない。

\[
E[C(S_t)]
\neq
C(E[S_t])
\]

CapとFloorを含む非線形Payoffでは、FX分布全体を考慮する必要がある。

\section{11. Coupon
Cap／Floor到達確率}\label{coupon-capfloorux5230ux9054ux78baux7387}

各Coupon日について、シミュレーションされたCouponがFloorまたはCapに到達する確率を計算する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{coupon\_cap\_floor\_probability\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_cap\_floor\_probability\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}

  \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_dates =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{remaining\_coupon\_dates,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_times =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_times}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  coupon\_cap\_floor\_probability\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC coupon floor and cap probabilities"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{60}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 37 x 6}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}    coupon\_number floor\_probability cap\_probability interior\_probability}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}            \textless{}int\textgreater{}             \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}           \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}                \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  1             1          0                  0.931               0.0687}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  2             2          0.000667           0.803               0.197 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  3             3          0.0137             0.722               0.265 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  4             4          0.0347             0.653               0.312 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  5             5          0.0633             0.615               0.322 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  6             6          0.0917             0.581               0.327 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  7             7          0.118              0.546               0.336 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  8             8          0.150              0.523               0.327 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}  9             9          0.175              0.493               0.332 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 10            10          0.205              0.465               0.330 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 27 more rows}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# i 2 more variables: coupon\_date \textless{}date\textgreater{}, time \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Cap確率、Linear領域の確率およびFloor確率は、長期的なCouponの性質を直接示す。現在のSpotがCap水準を上回っていても、長期Couponが常にCapへ固定されるとは限らない。

\section{12. Coupon分布}\label{couponux5206ux5e03}

短期、中期、長期の代表的なCoupon日について、Coupon
rateの分布を比較する。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{coupon\_path\_matrix\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_coupon\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_rate =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{number\_of\_coupon\_steps\_prdc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  coupon\_path\_matrix\_prdc}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{distribution\_coupon\_ids }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{pmax}\NormalTok{(}
    \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L,}
    \FunctionTok{pmin}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      number\_of\_coupon\_steps\_prdc,}
      \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
        \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L,}
        \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{          number\_of\_coupon\_steps\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{/}
            \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{        ),}
\NormalTok{        number\_of\_coupon\_steps\_prdc}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{coupon\_distribution\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  distribution\_coupon\_ids,}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(coupon\_id) \{}
\NormalTok{    tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{coupon\_number =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_id,}
      \AttributeTok{coupon\_date =} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        fx\_path\_generator\_prdc}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{remaining\_coupon\_dates[}
\NormalTok{          coupon\_id}
\NormalTok{        ]}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \AttributeTok{coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_path\_matrix\_prdc[}
\NormalTok{        coupon\_id,}
\NormalTok{      ]}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{coupon\_distribution\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  coupon\_distribution\_tbl,}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coupon\_rate}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{30}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.3}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}
    \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{coupon\_date,}
    \AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free\_y"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{scale\_x\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{percent\_format}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{accuracy =} \FloatTok{0.1}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Simulated PRDC coupon distributions"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Coupon rate"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Path count"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{()}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(coupon\_distribution\_plot)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch09_exotic_derivatives_prdc_files/figure-pdf/chapter09-coupon-distribution-1.pdf}}

Coupon分布は連続的な正規分布または対数正規分布ではない。FloorとCapに確率質量が集まり、その間にLinear領域の連続分布が存在する。

\section{13. FX Spot感応度}\label{fx-spotux611fux5fdcux5ea6}

PRDC CouponはFX Spotへ直接依存する。Spotを上下させたシナリオを比較する。

各シナリオで同じ乱数Seedを使用することにより、Monte
Carloノイズを抑えたCommon Random Numbers型の比較となる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{spot\_scenario\_input\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{scenario,       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{fx\_spot,}
  \StringTok{"spot\_minus\_10"}\NormalTok{,  fx\_spot\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*} \FloatTok{0.90}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"spot\_minus\_5"}\NormalTok{,   fx\_spot\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"base"}\NormalTok{,           fx\_spot\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"spot\_plus\_5"}\NormalTok{,    fx\_spot\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*} \FloatTok{1.05}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"spot\_plus\_10"}\NormalTok{,   fx\_spot\_prdc }\SpecialCharTok{*} \FloatTok{1.10}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{spot\_sensitivity\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_spot\_sensitivity\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{spot\_scenarios =}\NormalTok{ spot\_scenario\_input\_tbl,}
  \AttributeTok{valuation\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_schedule =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_schedule\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{foreign\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ foreign\_curve\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{domestic\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ domestic\_curve\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{volatility\_handle =}\NormalTok{ fx\_volatility\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_curve =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_dates =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_dates\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{n\_paths =}\NormalTok{ sensitivity\_paths\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ random\_seed\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{redemption\_amount =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{base\_scenario =} \StringTok{"base"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{spot\_sensitivity\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  spot\_sensitivity\_tbl,}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fx\_spot,}
    \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{prdc\_npv}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.7}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{2.2}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"PRDC FX spot sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"FX spot"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"PRDC NPV"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  spot\_sensitivity\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC FX spot sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   scenario      fx\_spot   prdc\_npv npv\_difference\_from\_base}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}           \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}                    \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 spot\_minus\_10    120. 317016976.               {-}16325124.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 spot\_minus\_5     127. 325687168.                {-}7654931.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 base             133. 333342099.                       0 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 spot\_plus\_5      140. 340136016.                 6793916.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 spot\_plus\_10     147. 346121967.                12779868.}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(spot\_sensitivity\_plot)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch09_exotic_derivatives_prdc_files/figure-pdf/chapter09-spot-sensitivity-1.pdf}}

Spot上昇はCouponを上昇させる方向に働くが、Capへ到達した後の限界効果は小さくなる。Spot低下時も、Floorへ到達するとCouponの低下は止まる。このため、PRDC価値のSpot感応度は全域で一定ではない。

\section{14. FX Volatility感応度}\label{fx-volatilityux611fux5fdcux5ea6}

PRDC Couponは、FloorとCapを持つ非線形Payoffである。そのため、FX
volatilityの変化は将来のFX分布だけでなく、Floor、Linear領域およびCapへ入る確率を変化させる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{volatility\_scenario\_input\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{scenario,     }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{fx\_volatility,}
  \StringTok{"vol\_5pct"}\NormalTok{,     }\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"vol\_7\_5pct"}\NormalTok{,   }\FloatTok{0.075}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"base"}\NormalTok{,         fx\_volatility\_prdc,}
  \StringTok{"vol\_12\_5pct"}\NormalTok{,  }\FloatTok{0.125}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"vol\_15pct"}\NormalTok{,    }\FloatTok{0.15}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{volatility\_sensitivity\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_volatility\_sensitivity\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{volatility\_scenarios =}\NormalTok{ volatility\_scenario\_input\_tbl,}
  \AttributeTok{valuation\_date =}\NormalTok{ valuation\_date\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{coupon\_schedule =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_schedule\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{spot =}\NormalTok{ fx\_spot\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{foreign\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ foreign\_curve\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{domestic\_curve\_handle =}\NormalTok{ domestic\_curve\_handle\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{discount\_curve =}\NormalTok{ discount\_curve\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{day\_counter =}\NormalTok{ fx\_day\_counter\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{calendar =}\NormalTok{ QuantLib}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{NullCalendar}\NormalTok{(),}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_dates =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_dates\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{n\_paths =}\NormalTok{ sensitivity\_paths\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{seed =}\NormalTok{ random\_seed\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{redemption\_amount =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{base\_scenario =} \StringTok{"base"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{volatility\_sensitivity\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  volatility\_sensitivity\_tbl,}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fx\_volatility,}
    \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{prdc\_npv}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{linewidth =} \FloatTok{0.7}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{2.2}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{scale\_x\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{percent\_format}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{accuracy =} \FloatTok{0.1}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"PRDC FX volatility sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"FX volatility"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"PRDC NPV"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{  ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  volatility\_sensitivity\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC FX volatility sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 5 x 4}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   scenario    fx\_volatility   prdc\_npv npv\_difference\_from\_base}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}               \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}                    \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 vol\_5pct            0.05  337897654.                 4555555.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 vol\_7\_5pct          0.075 335766964.                 2424865.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 base                0.1   333342099.                       0 }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 vol\_12\_5pct         0.125 330911366.                {-}2430733.}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 vol\_15pct           0.15  328542072.                {-}4800028.}

\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(volatility\_sensitivity\_plot)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{part2_quantive_riemann/ch09_exotic_derivatives_prdc_files/figure-pdf/chapter09-volatility-sensitivity-1.pdf}}

通常のOptionのように「Volatility上昇は必ず価値上昇」と単純には言えない。PRDC
CouponはCap付きの上昇Payoffであると同時にFloorを持ち、現在のSpot、金利差、満期および各境界への到達確率によってVolatility感応度が変わる。

\section{15. Monte
Carlo標準誤差}\label{monte-carloux6a19ux6e96ux8aa4ux5dee}

Monte
Carlo推定値には統計誤差が存在する。各パスについて全CouponとRedemptionの現在価値を計算し、標本平均、標準偏差、標準誤差および信頼区間を求める。

標準誤差は、パス現在価値の標準偏差を \(\widehat{\sigma}_{PV}\)、パス数を
\(M\) とすると、

\[
SE
=
\frac{
\widehat{\sigma}_{PV}
}{
\sqrt{M}
}
\]

である。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{monte\_carlo\_error\_result }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{prdc\_monte\_carlo\_error\_GQL}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{path\_matrix =}\NormalTok{ fx\_path\_matrix\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cashflow\_tbl =}\NormalTok{ prdc\_cashflow\_tbl,}
  \AttributeTok{notional =}\NormalTok{ notional\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{fx\_base =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_fx\_base\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{leverage =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_leverage\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{subtraction =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_subtraction\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{floor\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_floor\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{cap\_rate =}\NormalTok{ coupon\_cap\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_dates =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_dates\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{intro\_coupon\_rate =}\NormalTok{ intro\_coupon\_rate\_prdc,}
  \AttributeTok{confidence\_level =} \FloatTok{0.95}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{path\_present\_value\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ monte\_carlo\_error\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{path\_present\_values}
\NormalTok{monte\_carlo\_error\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ monte\_carlo\_error\_result}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{summary}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  monte\_carlo\_error\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"PRDC Monte Carlo error estimate"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 7 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   metric                        value}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                         \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 number\_of\_paths             3000   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 mean\_present\_value     334557294.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 present\_value\_sd        36143296.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 standard\_error            659883.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 lower\_confidence\_bound 333263946.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 upper\_confidence\_bound 335850641.  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 7 confidence\_level               0.95}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

パス数を4倍にすると、他の条件が同じであれば標準誤差は概ね半分になる。ただし、計算量も増加する。実務では、パス数を増やすだけでなく、Antithetic
Variates、Control Variates、Quasi-Monte
Carloなどの分散削減法を併用する。

\section{16. PRDC評価の限界}\label{prdcux8a55ux4fa1ux306eux9650ux754c}

本章のモデルは、PRDCの基本的な非線形CouponとMonte
Carlo評価を理解するための簡略モデルである。主な制約は次のとおりである。

\subsection{16.1
金利を決定論的とした}\label{ux91d1ux5229ux3092ux6c7aux5b9aux8ad6ux7684ux3068ux3057ux305f}

Domestic、ForeignおよびDiscount
Curveをフラットかつ決定論的とした。実際の長期PRDCでは、Domestic金利とForeign金利の変動が、FX
Forward、割引係数およびCoupon価値へ影響する。

\subsection{16.2 FX
volatilityを一定とした}\label{fx-volatilityux3092ux4e00ux5b9aux3068ux3057ux305f}

一定のBlack volatilityを使用した。実際のFX
Option市場には、満期方向とStrike方向のVolatility
Surfaceが存在する。長期PRDCでは、Smile、SkewおよびVolatility term
structureの影響が重要となる。

\subsection{16.3
相関を明示的に扱っていない}\label{ux76f8ux95a2ux3092ux660eux793aux7684ux306bux6271ux3063ux3066ux3044ux306aux3044}

本格的なPRDCモデルでは、Domestic金利、Foreign金利およびFXの間の相関を扱う必要がある。金利とFXを別々に評価して単純に合成するだけでは、長期のCross-currencyリスクを十分に表現できない。

\subsection{16.4
発行体コール権を含めていない}\label{ux767aux884cux4f53ux30b3ux30fcux30ebux6a29ux3092ux542bux3081ux3066ux3044ux306aux3044}

実際のPRDCには、発行体がCoupon日に商品を期限前償還できるCallable条項が含まれることが多い。

発行体は各行使日で、

\[
\text{Call value}
\quad\text{と}\quad
\text{Continuation value}
\]

を比較する。将来のContinuation
valueはClosed-formでは求めにくいため、Least-Squares Monte
CarloまたはBackward Inductionを使用する。

本章の評価結果は、非Callable PRDCのCoupon LegとRedemption
Legの価値である。Callable PRDCの投資家価値は、概念的には次式となる。

\[
V_{\mathrm{callable\ PRDC}}
=
V_{\mathrm{noncallable\ PRDC}}
-
V_{\mathrm{issuer\ call}}
\]

\section{17. Part IIのまとめ}\label{part-iiux306eux307eux3068ux3081}

第II部では、金融商品のキャッシュフロー、マーケットコンベンション、確率モデルおよび数値計算を段階的に扱った。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{part2\_chapter\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{chapter, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{subject,                              }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{main\_method,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}1"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Bonds and market conventions"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"Yield, price, duration, and convexity"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}2"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Treasury futures and CTD"}\NormalTok{,             }\StringTok{"Basis, carry, implied repo, and futures BPV"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}3"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"OIS and multi{-}curve valuation"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"Discount and forecast curve separation"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}4"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Black model"}\NormalTok{,                          }\StringTok{"Lognormal forward{-}option pricing"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}5"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Normal model"}\NormalTok{,                         }\StringTok{"Bachelier pricing for zero and negative rates"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}6"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"SABR model"}\NormalTok{,                           }\StringTok{"Volatility{-}smile calibration"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}7"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Callable Bond and Hull{-}White"}\NormalTok{,          }\StringTok{"Short{-}rate tree and early exercise"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}8"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Credit risk and CDS"}\NormalTok{,                  }\StringTok{"Hazard curve, MidPoint, and ISDA valuation"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"II{-}9"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Exotic derivatives and PRDC"}\NormalTok{,          }\StringTok{"FX{-}linked coupon Monte Carlo valuation"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  part2\_chapter\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Part II chapter summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 9 x 3}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   chapter subject                       main\_method                             }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                         \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                                   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 II{-}1    Bonds and market conventions  Yield, price, duration, and convexity   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 II{-}2    Treasury futures and CTD      Basis, carry, implied repo, and futures\textasciitilde{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 II{-}3    OIS and multi{-}curve valuation Discount and forecast curve separation  }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 II{-}4    Black model                   Lognormal forward{-}option pricing        }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 II{-}5    Normal model                  Bachelier pricing for zero and negative\textasciitilde{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 II{-}6    SABR model                    Volatility{-}smile calibration            }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 7 II{-}7    Callable Bond and Hull{-}White  Short{-}rate tree and early exercise      }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 8 II{-}8    Credit risk and CDS           Hazard curve, MidPoint, and ISDA valuat\textasciitilde{}}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 9 II{-}9    Exotic derivatives and PRDC   FX{-}linked coupon Monte Carlo valuation}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

債券評価から始まり、金利先物、OIS、Option、Volatility
Smile、短期金利モデル、信用リスク、そして複数の市場要因を持つエキゾチック商品へ進んだ。

Part
IIを通じた共通原則は、商品ごとに異なる数式を暗記することではない。次の要素を分離し、再利用可能な計算層へ落とすことである。

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  契約条件とSchedule
\item
  市場データとCurve
\item
  リスク中立測度と確率過程
\item
  Cash flowとPayoff
\item
  Pricing Engineまたは数値計算法
\item
  NPV、RiskおよびCalibration
\item
  表示と検証
\end{itemize}

GaussQuantは、QuantLib
SWIGの低水準オブジェクトを金融商品の計算層へまとめる。LagrangeFinanceの章側は、商品構造、数式、入力条件、表、グラフおよび金融的解釈に集中する。

\section{18. 本章のまとめ}\label{ux672cux7ae0ux306eux307eux3068ux3081}

PRDCは、将来のFX Rateに連動するCouponを持つ長期の仕組債である。

Coupon rateは、

\[
C(S)
=
\min
\left[
C_{\max},
\max
\left(
a\frac{S}{S_0}-b,
C_{\min}
\right)
\right]
\]

というFloor付き・Cap付きの非線形Payoffである。

Garman--Kohlhagenモデルでは、FX
Rateのリスク中立ドリフトはDomestic金利とForeign金利の差によって決まる。

\[
\frac{dS_t}{S_t}
=
(r_d-r_f)dt
+
\sigma_{\mathrm{FX}}dW_t
\]

Coupon日のFX分布をMonte Carloで生成し、各Coupon日の期待Coupon、Coupon
Leg、Redemption LegおよびPRDC NPVを計算した。

FX SpotとFX volatilityの感応度は、FloorとCapによって非線形となる。Monte
Carlo評価には統計誤差があるため、NPVだけでなく標準誤差と信頼区間を確認する必要がある。

本章は非Callable PRDCを対象とした。実際のCallable
PRDCには、Domestic金利、Foreign金利、FX、Volatility
Surface、相関および発行体の早期行使判断を同時に扱う、より高度なモデルが必要となる。

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{chapter09\_summary\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
  \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{section,                 }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{main\_result,}
  \StringTok{"Coupon payoff"}\NormalTok{,           }\StringTok{"Floored and capped FX{-}linked coupon"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"FX process"}\NormalTok{,              }\StringTok{"Garman{-}Kohlhagen risk{-}neutral dynamics"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Monte Carlo valuation"}\NormalTok{,   }\StringTok{"Coupon leg and redemption leg NPV"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Spot sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,        }\StringTok{"Nonlinear response caused by cap and floor"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Volatility sensitivity"}\NormalTok{,  }\StringTok{"Distributional effect on coupon regions"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Monte Carlo error"}\NormalTok{,       }\StringTok{"Standard error and confidence interval"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Model boundary"}\NormalTok{,          }\StringTok{"Non{-}callable deterministic{-}rate PRDC"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{GaussQuant}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{show\_tbl\_GQH}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  chapter09\_summary\_tbl,}
  \StringTok{"Chapter II{-}9 summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{20}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} \# A tibble: 7 x 2}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   section                main\_result                               }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{}   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                  \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                                     }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 1 Coupon payoff          Floored and capped FX{-}linked coupon       }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 2 FX process             Garman{-}Kohlhagen risk{-}neutral dynamics    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 3 Monte Carlo valuation  Coupon leg and redemption leg NPV         }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 4 Spot sensitivity       Nonlinear response caused by cap and floor}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 5 Volatility sensitivity Distributional effect on coupon regions   }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 6 Monte Carlo error      Standard error and confidence interval    }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} 7 Model boundary         Non{-}callable deterministic{-}rate PRDC}

\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{Chapter II{-}9 Exotic derivatives and PRDC completed successfully.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} }
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} Chapter II{-}9 Exotic derivatives and PRDC completed successfully.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
